Description: 'Basic SQS Queue for standard message queuing'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Amazon S3 bucket with security defaults

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketNamePrefix: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-bkt'
      BucketNamespace: 'account-regional'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Fn::Sub:
          - |
            {
              "Version": "2012-10-17",
              "Statement": [
                {
                  "Sid": "ForceSSL",
                  "Effect": "Deny",
                  "Principal": "*",
                  "Action": "s3:*",
                  "Resource": [ "${BucketArn}", "${BucketArn}/*" ],
                  "Condition": {
                    "Bool": {
                      "aws:SecureTransport": "false"
                    }
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
          - BucketArn: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the provisioned S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the provisioned S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template that creates an Amazon S3 bucket configured for static
  website hosting with DeletionPolicy: Retain for protection against accidental
  deletion.

Resources:
  WebsiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-website-${AWS::StackName}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: false
        BlockPublicPolicy: false
        IgnorePublicAcls: false
        RestrictPublicBuckets: false
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      WebsiteConfiguration:
        IndexDocument: index.html
        ErrorDocument: error.html
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-website-bucket"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StaticWebsite

  WebsiteBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref WebsiteBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: PublicReadGetObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:GetObject"
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${WebsiteBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SecureTransport": "true"

Outputs:
  WebsiteBucketWebsiteURL:
    Description: The URL of the website hosted on the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt WebsiteBucket.WebsiteURL

  WebsiteBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref WebsiteBucket

  WebsiteBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt WebsiteBucket.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instance with latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '.*'
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access to the instance (optional)
  SSHLocation:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: The IP address range that can be used to SSH to the EC2 instance. Default 0.0.0.0/0 allows access from anywhere (not secure). Restrict to your IP for production.

Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Resource"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Resource"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Resource"

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocation
          Description: SSH
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: All outbound traffic
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Resource"

  Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            DeleteOnTermination: false
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Resource"

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt Instance.PublicIp
  PublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt Instance.PublicDnsName
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-83fbb5b5' on aws", 'iac-god-eval-83fbb5b5: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - User Initiated', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Eventual consistency check initiated', 'VPC: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Eventual consistency check initiated', 'PublicSubnet: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SubnetRouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SubnetRouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'SubnetRouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'Instance: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'Instance: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'Instance: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DefaultPublicRoute: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DefaultPublicRoute: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'DefaultPublicRoute: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a DynamoDB table storing ArtistId, Concert, and TicketSales data with GSI, PITR, encryption, and deletion protection.'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    AllowedValues:
      - Development
      - Staging
      - Production
    Description: 'Deployment environment for tagging.'

Resources:
  ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: ArtistId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: Concert
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: TicketSales
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: ArtistId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: Concert
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TicketSalesIndex'
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: TicketSales
              KeyType: HASH
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  ArtistConcertTicketSalesTableName:
    Description: 'The name of the ArtistConcertTicketSales DynamoDB table'
    Value: !Ref ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable
  ArtistConcertTicketSalesTableArn:
    Description: 'The ARN of the ArtistConcertTicketSales DynamoDB table'
    Value: !GetAtt ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable.Arn

    af-south-1:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0f8e9d1c2b3a4e5f6
    il-central-1:

Conditions:

    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']

      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

        - Key: Name

        - Key: Name

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for basic EC2 instance with SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SG"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AmazonLinux2]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -ex
          exec > >(tee /var/log/user-data.log | logger -t user-data -s 2>/dev/console) 2>&1
          yum update -y
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
    DependsOn:
      - SubnetRouteTableAssociation
      - VPCGatewayAttachment

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID of the newly created instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: ID of the Security Group
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
  VPCId:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Basic EC2 t3.micro instance with secure remote management via AWS Systems Manager (SSM).
  Uses region-specific SSM-optimized Amazon Linux 2 AMI, minimal VPC networking,
  security group with outbound HTTPS only, and IAM role for SSM core permissions.

Mappings:
  SSMAMIMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a313d6098716f372
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0b0dcb5067d3423bc
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    af-south-1:
      AMI: ami-09cfeb152a998d4eb
    ap-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0d3f619f0cf0a5a51
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-0d5e71ab2937b5d0d
    ap-northeast-3:
      AMI: ami-0c7c0b8f3e1b2a5d6
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0e01e40b0d1e7f80a
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0b8982d8230e1a7cb
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0a06d5a3e5f2b8c4d
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0a40f3f5f1f217e5c
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0a0bb7b6e1f2a3b4c
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-047a51e17af6a4a5d
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a5c3558529278c43
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0abc123def45678901
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-0e01b4e8f6d2c5a7b
    eu-north-1:
      AMI: ami-0f8e9d7c6b5a43210
    me-south-1:
      AMI: ami-0e9f8d7c6b5a43210
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0d3c2b1a098765432f

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Minimal security group for SSM-managed EC2 instance (outbound HTTPS only)'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSecurityGroup'

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
        Count: 1
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [SSMAMIMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Monitoring: false
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl restart amazon-ssm-agent
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceId'

  InstancePublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicDnsName'

  SSMStatus:
    Description: Status description for SSM management
    Value: !Sub 'EC2 Instance ${EC2Instance} is SSM-managed. Use Session Manager for secure remote access (no SSH key required).'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMStatus'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudWatch Dashboard for NAT Gateway VPC Flow Logs Insights with top source IPs and rejected traffic analysis'

Parameters:
  DashboardName:
    Type: String
    Default: NATGatewayFlowLogsDashboard
    Description: 'Name of the CloudWatch Dashboard'
  LogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: '/aws/vpc/flowlogs'
    Description: 'VPC Flow Logs log group name (e.g., /aws/vpc/flowlog/vpc-xxx-flowlog)'
  RefreshRate:
    Type: String
    Default: '5'
    AllowedValues: ['1', '5', '15', '30', '60']
    Description: 'Refresh interval in minutes'

Resources:
  NatGatewayDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: !Ref DashboardName
      DashboardBody: !Sub |
        {
          "widgets": [
            {
              "type": "logs",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 0,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "title": "Top 10 Source IPs by Outbound Bytes (ACCEPT)",
                "queries": [
                  {
                    "id": "a1",
                    "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                    "queryString": "fields @timestamp, interfaceId, srcAddr, bytes, action | filter interfaceId like /eni-/ | filter action = \"ACCEPT\" | stats sum(bytes) as totalBytes by srcAddr | sort totalBytes desc | limit 10",
                    "logGroupNames": ["${LogGroupName}"]
                  }
                ],
                "view": "table",
                "stacked": false,
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "refreshConfiguration": {
                  "interval": "${RefreshRate}",
                  "title": "${RefreshRate} Minutes"
                }
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "logs",
              "x": 12,
              "y": 0,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "title": "Top 10 Source IPs by Outbound Packets (ACCEPT)",
                "queries": [
                  {
                    "id": "b1",
                    "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                    "queryString": "fields @timestamp, interfaceId, srcAddr, packets, action | filter interfaceId like /eni-/ | filter action = \"ACCEPT\" | stats sum(packets) as totalPackets by srcAddr | sort totalPackets desc | limit 10",
                    "logGroupNames": ["${LogGroupName}"]
                  }
                ],
                "view": "table",
                "stacked": false,
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "refreshConfiguration": {
                  "interval": "${RefreshRate}",
                  "title": "${RefreshRate} Minutes"
                }
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "logs",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 6,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "title": "Top 10 Source IPs by Rejected Connections",
                "queries": [
                  {
                    "id": "c1",
                    "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                    "queryString": "fields @timestamp, interfaceId, srcAddr, action | filter interfaceId like /eni-/ | filter action = \"REJECT\" | stats count() as rejectCount by srcAddr | sort rejectCount desc | limit 10",
                    "logGroupNames": ["${LogGroupName}"]
                  }
                ],
                "view": "table",
                "stacked": false,
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "refreshConfiguration": {
                  "interval": "${RefreshRate}",
                  "title": "${RefreshRate} Minutes"
                }
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "logs",
              "x": 12,
              "y": 6,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "title": "Top 10 Destination IPs by Rejected Connections",
                "queries": [
                  {
                    "id": "d1",
                    "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                    "queryString": "fields @timestamp, interfaceId, dstAddr, action | filter interfaceId like /eni-/ | filter action = \"REJECT\" | stats count() as rejectCount by dstAddr | sort rejectCount desc | limit 10",
                    "logGroupNames": ["${LogGroupName}"]
                  }
                ],
                "view": "table",
                "stacked": false,
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "refreshConfiguration": {
                  "interval": "${RefreshRate}",
                  "title": "${RefreshRate} Minutes"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }

Outputs:
  DashboardUrl:
    Description: 'URL for the NAT Gateway Flow Logs Dashboard'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${AWS::Region}.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudwatch/home?region=${AWS::Region}#dashboards:name=${DashboardName}'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for a DynamoDB table storing mobile notifications reporting data, featuring a Global Secondary Index on type and sentTime for time-based queries, pay-per-request billing for cost efficiency, and TTL for automatic cleanup of stale data.

Parameters:
  TableName:
    Type: String
    Default: MobileNotificationsReportingTable
    Description: Base name for the DynamoDB table.

Resources:
  Table:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${TableName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: type
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: ttl
        Enabled: true
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: TypeSentTimeIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: type
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: sentTime
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MobileNotificationsReporting

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref Table
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TableName"
  TableArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt Table.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TableArn"
  TypeSentTimeIndexArn:
    Description: ARN of the TypeSentTimeIndex Global Secondary Index
    Value: !Sub "${Table.Arn}/index/TypeSentTimeIndex"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TypeSentTimeIndexArn"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public subnet, Internet Gateway, Route Table, Security Group, single ENI with primary and secondary private IPs, two EIPs, and EIP associations to the ENI's private IPs, enabling a single EC2 instance (attached separately via DeviceIndex 1) to handle multiple public-facing IP addresses through one network interface.

Resources:
  MultiIPVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MultiIPVPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  MultiIPIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MultiIPIGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  IGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MultiIPVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref MultiIPIGW

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MultiIPVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MultiIPVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref MultiIPIGW
    DependsOn: IGWAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  ENISecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group allowing all outbound traffic for Multi-IP ENI (customize inbound for EC2 needs)
      VpcId: !Ref MultiIPVPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ENISecurityGroup"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  MultiIPENI:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      GroupSet:
        - !Ref ENISecurityGroup
      PrivateIpAddresses:
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10
          Primary: true
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11
          Primary: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MultiIPENI"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  PrimaryEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrimaryEIP"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  SecondaryEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecondaryEIP"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Multi-IP ENI for EC2"

  PrimaryEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt PrimaryEIP.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref MultiIPENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10

  SecondaryEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt SecondaryEIP.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref MultiIPENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11

Outputs:
  MultiIPENI:
    Description: NetworkInterfaceId of the Multi-IP ENI (attach to EC2 instance at DeviceIndex 1)
    Value: !Ref MultiIPENI
  PrimaryPrivateIPAddress:
    Description: Primary Private IP Address of the ENI
    Value: !GetAtt MultiIPENI.PrimaryPrivateIpAddress
  SecondaryPrivateIPAddress:
    Description: First Secondary Private IP Address of the ENI
    Value: !Select [0, !GetAtt MultiIPENI.SecondaryPrivateIpAddresses]
  PrimaryEIPAllocationId:
    Description: AllocationId of Primary EIP
    Value: !GetAtt PrimaryEIP.AllocationId
  SecondaryEIPAllocationId:
    Description: AllocationId of Secondary EIP
    Value: !GetAtt SecondaryEIP.AllocationId
  PrimaryEIPPublicDNSName:
    Description: Public IP of Primary EIP
    Value: !GetAtt PrimaryEIP.PublicIp
  SecondaryEIPPublicDNSName:
    Description: Public IP of Secondary EIP
    Value: !GetAtt SecondaryEIP.PublicIp

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Simple API Gateway REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration'

Parameters:
  ApiName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyRestApi
  LambdaRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: python3.12
    AllowedValues:
      - python3.10
      - python3.11
      - python3.12

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  MyLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: !Ref LambdaRuntime
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
            return {
              'statusCode': 200,
              'headers': {
                'Content-Type': 'text/plain'
              },
              'body': 'Hello from Lambda non-proxy!'
            }
      Timeout: 30

  MyRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ApiName
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  GetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt MyRestApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${MyLambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations'

  LambdaInvokePermission:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to deploy AWS Glue Database and Crawler for cataloging CloudTrail logs in S3, enabling structured Athena queries.'

Parameters:
  S3BucketPath:
    Type: String
    Default: 's3://kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/'
    Description: 'S3 path to CloudTrail logs (e.g., s3://bucket/prefix/)'

Resources:
  CloudtrailLogsDatabase:
    Type: 'AWS::Glue::Database'
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: 'cloudtrail_logs_db'

  GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 'glue.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'S3AccessPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Action:
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                  - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
                Resource:
                  Fn::Sub:
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::${bucket}'
                    - bucket:
                        Fn::Select:
                          - 2
                          - Fn::Split:
                              - '/'
                              - !Ref S3BucketPath
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                Resource:
                  Fn::Sub:
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::${bucket}/*'
                    - bucket:
                        Fn::Select:
                          - 2
                          - Fn::Split:
                              - '/'
                              - !Ref S3BucketPath

  CloudtrailLogsCrawler:
    Type: 'AWS::Glue::Crawler'
    Properties:
      Name: 'cloudtrail_logs_crawler'
      Role: !GetAtt 'GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole.Arn'
      DatabaseName: !Ref 'CloudtrailLogsDatabase'
      Description: 'Glue Crawler for CloudTrail logs in S3'
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Ref 'S3BucketPath'
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: 'LOG'
        DeleteBehavior: 'LOG'
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: 'CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY'
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: 'cron(0 2 * * ? *)'
      TablePrefix: 'cloudtrail_'
      Configuration: |
        {
          "Version": 1.0,
          "CrawlerOutput": {
            "Partitions": { "AddOrUpdateBehavior": "InheritFromTable" },
            "Tables": { "AddOrUpdateBehavior": "MergeNewColumns" }
          },
          "Grouping": { "TableGroupingPolicy": "CombineCompatibleSchemas" }
        }

Outputs:
  GlueDatabaseName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue Database for CloudTrail tables (use in Athena)'
    Value: !Ref 'CloudtrailLogsDatabase'
  GlueCrawlerName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue Crawler (use for manual triggers or monitoring)'
    Value: !Ref 'CloudtrailLogsCrawler'
  IAMRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM Role used by the Glue Crawler'
    Value: !GetAtt 'GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole.Arn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for multi-threshold monthly AWS billing cost monitoring with CloudWatch alarms evaluated every 6 hours, SNS topic, and email notifications on threshold breaches at $5, $10, $20, and $40 USD."

Resources:
  BillingAlertsTopic:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      DisplayName: "AWS Billing Threshold Alerts"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  BillingSubscription:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Subscription"
    Properties:
      Endpoint: "xxxxx@gmail.com"
      Protocol: "email"
      TopicArn: !Ref "BillingAlertsTopic"

  BillingAlarm5USD:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm5USD"
      AlarmDescription: "Monthly estimated charges exceed $5 USD. Notifies via SNS email."
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "Currency"
          Value: "USD"
      Statistic: "Sum"
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: 5
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold"
      TreatMissingData: "notBreaching"
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref "BillingAlertsTopic"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  BillingAlarm10USD:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm10USD"
      AlarmDescription: "Monthly estimated charges exceed $10 USD. Notifies via SNS email."
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "Currency"
          Value: "USD"
      Statistic: "Sum"
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: 10
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold"
      TreatMissingData: "notBreaching"
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref "BillingAlertsTopic"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  BillingAlarm20USD:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm20USD"
      AlarmDescription: "Monthly estimated charges exceed $20 USD. Notifies via SNS email."
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "Currency"
          Value: "USD"
      Statistic: "Sum"
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: 20
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold"
      TreatMissingData: "notBreaching"
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref "BillingAlertsTopic"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  BillingAlarm40USD:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "BillingAlarm40USD"
      AlarmDescription: "Monthly estimated charges exceed $40 USD. Notifies via SNS email."
      Namespace: "AWS/Billing"
      MetricName: "EstimatedCharges"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "Currency"
          Value: "USD"
      Statistic: "Sum"
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: 40
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold"
      TreatMissingData: "notBreaching"
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref "BillingAlertsTopic"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BillingMonitoring"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

Outputs:
  BillingAlertsTopicArn:
    Description: "ARN of the AWS Billing Threshold Alerts SNS Topic"
    Value: !Ref "BillingAlertsTopic"

  BillingSubscriptionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SNS email subscription for billing alerts"
    Value: !Ref "BillingSubscription"

  BillingAlarm5USDArn:
    Description: "ARN of the $5 USD billing alarm"
    Value: !Ref "BillingAlarm5USD"

  BillingAlarm10USDArn:
    Description: "ARN of the $10 USD billing alarm"
    Value: !Ref "BillingAlarm10USD"

  BillingAlarm20USDArn:
    Description: "ARN of the $20 USD billing alarm"
    Value: !Ref "BillingAlarm20USD"

  BillingAlarm40USDArn:
    Description: "ARN of the $40 USD billing alarm"
    Value: !Ref "BillingAlarm40USD"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  TableName:
    Type: String
    Default: "UserTable"
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
  EventBusName:
    Type: String
    Default: "UserEventsBus"
    Description: The name of the EventBus
Resources:
  UserTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Ref TableName
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: userId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: userId
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  UserEventsBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref EventBusName
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PipesExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PipesExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                Resource: !GetAtt UserTable.StreamArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt UserEventsBus.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/events/${AWS::StackName}-Pipe:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  AvatarUpdatePipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AvatarUpdatePipe'
      Source: !GetAtt UserTable.StreamArn
      Target: !GetAtt UserEventsBus.Arn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipesExecutionRole.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        DynamoDBStreamParameters:
          BatchSize: 1
          MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds: 0
          StartingPosition: LATEST
      Tags:
        Project: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
Outputs:
  UserTableArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Table
    Value: !GetAtt UserTable.Arn
  UserTableStreamArn:
    Description: Stream ARN of the DynamoDB Table
    Value: !GetAtt UserTable.StreamArn
  UserEventsBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt UserEventsBus.Arn
  AvatarUpdatePipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Pipe
    Value: !GetAtt AvatarUpdatePipe.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Amazon EventBridge configuration to route custom events to an external API endpoint via HTTPS. Includes custom EventBus, API key authenticated Connection, and API Destination.

Parameters:
  ApiKeyValue:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: "test-api-key"
    Description: The API key value for authenticating requests to the external endpoint.
  ApiKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: X-API-Key
    Description: The name of the API key header used for authentication.

Resources:
  CustomEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: CustomEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  ExternalApiConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: !Ref ApiKeyName
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKeyValue

  WebhookApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt ExternalApiConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: https://webhook.site/testtest
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10
      HttpMethod: POST

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt CustomEventBus.Arn
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Connection secured with API key
    Value: !GetAtt ExternalApiConnection.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the API Destination targeting the external HTTPS endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt WebhookApiDestination.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-c16621b4' on aws", 'iac-god-eval-c16621b4: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - User Initiated', 'ExternalApiConnection: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CustomEventBus: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CustomEventBus: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'ExternalApiConnection: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'ExternalApiConnection: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'WebhookApiDestination: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CustomEventBus: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'WebhookApiDestination: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'WebhookApiDestination: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-c16621b4: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudWatch Dashboard and Logs Insights Queries for AWS Client VPN Usage Monitoring

Parameters:
  ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/vpn/connection-logs
    Description: Log group for Client VPN connection logs
  ClientVPNDataLogGroup:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/vpn/data-logs
    Description: Log group for Client VPN data logs
  DashboardName:
    Type: String
    Default: ClientVPN-Monitoring-Dashboard
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Dashboard
  TimeRange:
    Type: String
    Default: P7D
    Description: Relative time range for queries (e.g., P7D, PT1H)

Resources:
  QueryConnectionDurations:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: ClientVPN/Usage/ConnectionDurations
      QueryString: !Sub |
        fields @timestamp, connectionId, username, endpointId, eventType, connectionDuration, authMethod
        | filter eventType = "ClientDisconnect" and ispresent(connectionDuration)
        | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange})
        | stats avgDuration = avg(connectionDuration), maxDuration = max(connectionDuration), totalDuration = sum(connectionDuration) by bin(1h), username
        | sort totalDuration desc
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup
        - !Ref ClientVPNDataLogGroup

  QueryDataTransferIngressEgress:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: ClientVPN/Usage/DataTransferIngressEgress
      QueryString: !Sub |
        fields @timestamp, connectionId, username, endpointId, bytesReceived, bytesSent
        | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange})
        | stats sumIngress = sum(bytesReceived), sumEgress = sum(bytesSent) by bin(1h), connectionId, username, endpointId
        | sort sumIngress + sumEgress desc
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup
        - !Ref ClientVPNDataLogGroup

  QueryUserStatistics:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: ClientVPN/Activity/UserStatistics
      QueryString: !Sub |
        fields @timestamp, username, connectionId, bytesReceived, bytesSent
        | filter ispresent(username) and @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange})
        | stats sessions = count_distinct(connectionId), bytesTransferred = sum(bytesReceived + bytesSent) by username
        | sort bytesTransferred desc
        | limit 10
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup
        - !Ref ClientVPNDataLogGroup

  QueryAuthADSAML:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: ClientVPN/Auth/AD-SAML-Breakdown
      QueryString: !Sub |
        fields @timestamp, authMethod, connectionId, username, bytesReceived, bytesSent, connectionDuration
        | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange}) and authMethod in ["saml", "active-directory"]
        | stats connections = count_distinct(connectionId), users = count_distinct(username), totalBytes = sum(bytesReceived + bytesSent), totalDurationSeconds = sum(connectionDuration) by authMethod, bin(1h)
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup
        - !Ref ClientVPNDataLogGroup

  QueryAuthMutual:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: ClientVPN/Auth/MutualAuth-Breakdown
      QueryString: !Sub |
        fields @timestamp, authMethod, commonName, connectionId, connectionDuration, bytesReceived, bytesSent
        | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange}) and (authMethod = "mutual-auth" or ispresent(commonName))
        | stats connections = count_distinct(connectionId), avgDuration = avg(connectionDuration), throughput = sum(bytesReceived + bytesSent) by bin(1h)
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup
        - !Ref ClientVPNDataLogGroup

  QueryAuthMixed:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: ClientVPN/Auth/MixedAuth-Breakdown
      QueryString: !Sub |
        fields @timestamp, authMethod, commonName, username, connectionId, bytesReceived, bytesSent, connectionDuration
        | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange}) and ispresent(commonName) and ispresent(username)
        | stats connections = count_distinct(connectionId), users = count_distinct(username), totalDurationSeconds = sum(connectionDuration), totalBytes = sum(bytesReceived + bytesSent) by authCombo = concat(coalesce(authMethod, "unknown"), " + Cert"), bin(1h)
        | sort totalBytes desc
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup
        - !Ref ClientVPNDataLogGroup

  QueryEndpointsUsage:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: ClientVPN/Endpoints/UsageTable
      QueryString: !Sub |
        fields @timestamp, endpointId, connectionId, bytesReceived, bytesSent, username
        | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange}) and ispresent(endpointId)
        | stats totalConnections = count_distinct(connectionId), ingressBytes = sum(bytesReceived), egressBytes = sum(bytesSent), distinctUsers = count_distinct(username) by endpointId
        | sort ingressBytes + egressBytes desc
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup
        - !Ref ClientVPNDataLogGroup

  ClientVPNDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: !Ref DashboardName
      DashboardBody: !Sub |
        {
          "widgets": [
            {
              "type": "log",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 0,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "query": {
                  "queryId": "${QueryEndpointsUsage}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "title": "EndpointUsageTable"
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "x": 12,
              "y": 0,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "query": {
                  "queryId": "${QueryUserStatistics}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "title": "DistinctUserStats"
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 6,
              "width": 24,
              "height": 3,
              "properties": {
                "query": {
                  "logGroupNames": [ "${ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup}", "${ClientVPNDataLogGroup}" ],
                  "queryString": "fields @timestamp, authMethod, connectionId, username, bytesReceived, bytesSent, connectionDuration | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange}) | stats connectionCount = count_distinct(connectionId), userCount = count_distinct(username), totalDurationSeconds = sum(connectionDuration), ingressGB = sum(bytesReceived)/1000000000, egressGB = sum(bytesSent)/1000000000 by authMethod | sort connectionCount desc",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "title": "AuthTypeBreakdown"
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 9,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 3,
              "properties": {
                "query": {
                  "logGroupNames": [ "${ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup}", "${ClientVPNDataLogGroup}" ],
                  "queryString": "fields @timestamp, eventType, authMethod, connectionId | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange}) | stats newConnects = sum(if(eventType = \"ClientConnect\", 1, 0)), connections = count_distinct(connectionId) by bin(30m), authMethod | sort @timestamp desc",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}"
                },
                "view": "line",
                "title": "ConnectionTrends"
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "x": 12,
              "y": 9,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 3,
              "properties": {
                "query": {
                  "logGroupNames": [ "${ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup}", "${ClientVPNDataLogGroup}" ],
                  "queryString": "fields @timestamp, bytesReceived, bytesSent, authMethod, endpointId | filter @timestamp >= relativeTime(${TimeRange}) | stats ingressGB = sum(bytesReceived)/1000000000, egressGB = sum(bytesSent)/1000000000 by bin(1d), authMethod, endpointId",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}"
                },
                "view": "bar",
                "title": "DataTransferVolumes"
              }
            }
          ]
        }

Outputs:
  DashboardUrl:
    Description: Console URL for the CloudWatch Dashboard
    Value: !Sub "https://${AWS::Region}.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudwatch/home?region=${AWS::Region}#dashboards:name=${DashboardName}"
  QueryDefinitionArns:
    Description: ARNs of all QueryDefinitions
    Value: !Sub |
      {
        "ConnectionDurations": "${QueryConnectionDurations}",
        "DataTransferIngressEgress": "${QueryDataTransferIngressEgress}",
        "UserStatistics": "${QueryUserStatistics}",
        "AuthADSAML": "${QueryAuthADSAML}",
        "AuthMutual": "${QueryAuthMutual}",
        "AuthMixed": "${QueryAuthMixed}",
        "EndpointsUsage": "${QueryEndpointsUsage}"
      }
  LogGroupParameters:
    Description: Parameter values for log groups
    Value: !Sub |
      {
        "ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup": "${ClientVPNConnectionLogGroup}",
        "ClientVPNDataLogGroup": "${ClientVPNDataLogGroup}"
      }

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Timestream database and tables with configurable retention policies and error monitoring via CloudWatch alarms.'
Metadata:
  cfn-lint:
    config:
      ignore_checks:
        - W3697
Parameters:
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: poc-database
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9-]*'
    Description: 'for unique database naming'
  TablePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: poc-table-
    Description: 'for consistent table naming convention'
  Table01MemoryRetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 24
    Description: 'for poc-table-01-batch-write memory store retention'
  Table01MagneticRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 73000
    Default: 30
    Description: 'for poc-table-01-batch-write magnetic store retention'
  Table02MemoryRetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 720
    Description: 'for poc-table-02-older-records-memonly memory store retention emphasizing in-memory only use'
  Table02MagneticRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 73000
    Default: 0
    Description: 'to disable magnetic store for poc-table-02-older-records-memonly'
  Table03MemoryRetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 24
    Description: 'for poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic short-term memory retention'
  Table03MagneticRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 73000
    Default: 3650
    Description: 'for poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic long-term magnetic retention'
  Table04MemoryRetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 168
    Description: 'for poc-table-04-common-attributes balanced memory retention'
  Table04MagneticRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 73000
    Default: 365
    Description: 'for poc-table-04-common-attributes standard annual magnetic retention'
  EnableTimestream:
    Type: String
    Default: "no"
    AllowedValues: ["yes", "no"]
    Description: "Enable Timestream resources (set 'no' if service quota unsubscribed; alarms remain for future enablement)"
Conditions:
  CreateTimestream: !Equals [!Ref EnableTimestream, "yes"]
Resources:
  PocDatabase:
    Condition: CreateTimestream
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Database
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PocTable01BatchWrite:
    Condition: CreateTimestream
    DependsOn: PocDatabase
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      TableName: !Sub "${TablePrefix}01-batch-write"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref Table01MemoryRetentionHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref Table01MagneticRetentionDays
  PocTable02OlderRecordsMemOnly:
    Condition: CreateTimestream
    DependsOn: PocDatabase
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      TableName: !Sub "${TablePrefix}02-older-records-memonly"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref Table02MemoryRetentionHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref Table02MagneticRetentionDays
  PocTable03OlderRecordsMagnetic:
    Condition: CreateTimestream
    DependsOn: PocDatabase
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      TableName: !Sub "${TablePrefix}03-older-records-magnetic"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref Table03MemoryRetentionHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref Table03MagneticRetentionDays
  PocTable04CommonAttributes:
    Condition: CreateTimestream
    DependsOn: PocDatabase
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      TableName: !Sub "${TablePrefix}04-common-attributes"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref Table04MemoryRetentionHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref Table04MagneticRetentionDays
  Table01RecordsRejectedAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: 'Error handling for rejected records in batch-write table'
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: RecordsRejected
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: !Sub "${TablePrefix}01-batch-write"
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
  Table02RecordsRejectedAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: 'Error handling for rejected records in memory-only table'
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: RecordsRejected
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: !Sub "${TablePrefix}02-older-records-memonly"
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
  Table03RecordsRejectedAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: 'Error handling for rejected records in long-term magnetic table'
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: RecordsRejected
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: !Sub "${TablePrefix}03-older-records-magnetic"
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
  Table04RecordsRejectedAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: 'Error handling for rejected records in common attributes table'
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: RecordsRejected
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: !Sub "${TablePrefix}04-common-attributes"
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
Outputs:
  DatabaseArn:
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreateTimestream
        - !GetAtt PocDatabase.Arn
        - 'Timestream disabled - enable service quota'
  PocTable01BatchWriteArn:
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreateTimestream
        - !GetAtt PocTable01BatchWrite.Arn
        - 'Timestream disabled - enable service quota'
  PocTable02OlderRecordsMemOnlyArn:
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreateTimestream
        - !GetAtt PocTable02OlderRecordsMemOnly.Arn
        - 'Timestream disabled - enable service quota'
  PocTable03OlderRecordsMagneticArn:
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreateTimestream
        - !GetAtt PocTable03OlderRecordsMagnetic.Arn
        - 'Timestream disabled - enable service quota'
  PocTable04CommonAttributesArn:
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreateTimestream
        - !GetAtt PocTable04CommonAttributes.Arn
        - 'Timestream disabled - enable service quota'
  TableArns:
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreateTimestream
        - !Join
          - ', '
          - - !GetAtt PocTable01BatchWrite.Arn
            - !GetAtt PocTable02OlderRecordsMemOnly.Arn
            - !GetAtt PocTable03OlderRecordsMagnetic.Arn
            - !GetAtt PocTable04CommonAttributes.Arn
        - 'Timestream disabled - enable service quota'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a DynamoDB table with Local and Global Secondary Indexes.'

Parameters:
  TableNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyApp
  ReadCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
  WriteCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5

Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${TableNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: PK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: SK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: GSIPK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: GSISK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: LSIAttr
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: PK
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: SK
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PROVISIONED
      ProvisionedThroughput:
        ReadCapacityUnits: !Ref ReadCapacityUnits
        WriteCapacityUnits: !Ref WriteCapacityUnits
      LocalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: LSI1
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: PK
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: LSIAttr
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: GSI1
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: GSIPK
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: GSISK
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY
          ProvisionedThroughput:
            ReadCapacityUnits: !Ref ReadCapacityUnits
            WriteCapacityUnits: !Ref WriteCapacityUnits
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
  TableArn:
    Description: The ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.Arn
  LSI1IndexName:
    Description: Name of the Local Secondary Index
    Value: LSI1
  GSI1IndexName:
    Description: Name of the Global Secondary Index
    Value: GSI1

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a secure, production-ready DynamoDB table with best-practice configurations including PAY_PER_REQUEST billing, Point-in-Time Recovery, server-side encryption, deletion protection, and tags.'

Parameters:
  PartitionKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: id
    Description: 'The name of the partition key (HASH key). Default: id'
  SortKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: sortKey
    Description: 'The name of the sort key (RANGE key). Default: sortKey'

Resources:
  MyDynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}Table-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: !Ref PartitionKeyName
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: !Ref SortKeyName
          KeyType: RANGE
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: !Ref PartitionKeyName
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: !Ref SortKeyName
          AttributeType: S
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB table'
    Value: !Ref MyDynamoDBTable
  TableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB table'
    Value: !GetAtt MyDynamoDBTable.Arn
  PointInTimeRecoveryStatus:
    Description: 'Status of Point-in-Time Recovery'
    Value: !GetAtt MyDynamoDBTable.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Minimal-cost VPC with two public subnets in different AZs, ASG with Internet access, ElastiCache Redis Replication Group with Multi-AZ failover and automated snapshots, and Lambda for dynamic snapshot retention management.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZs:
        - us-east-1a
        - us-east-1b
    us-west-2:
      AZs:
        - us-west-2a
        - us-west-2b

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
  SubnetCidr1:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 1
  SubnetCidr2:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2
  SSHCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR for SSH access to EC2 instances
    AllowedPattern: ^(([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])(\/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2]))?$|^0\.0\.0\.0\/0$
  CacheNodeType:
    Type: String
    Default: cache.t4g.micro
    Description: ElastiCache node type (default minimal cost)
  SnapshotRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 35
    Description: Snapshot retention period in days (0 to disable)
  NumCacheNodes:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 6
  AsgMinSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
  AsgMaxSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
  AsgDesiredCapacity:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
  AmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI ID fetched via SSM Parameter Store

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !FindInMap
          - RegionMap
          - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
          - AZs
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr1
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !FindInMap
          - RegionMap
          - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
          - AZs
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr2
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ASG EC2 instances with SSH and outbound access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg'

  ElastiCacheSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ElastiCache allowing Redis from EC2 SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 6379
          ToPort: 6379
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-elasticache-sg'

  CacheSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Subnet group for ElastiCache in public subnets across AZs
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cache-subnet-group'

  ReplicationGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup
    Properties:
      ReplicationGroupId: !Sub 'cache-${AWS::StackName}'
      ReplicationGroupDescription: Redis cluster with Multi-AZ failover and snapshots
      Engine: redis
      EngineVersion: 6.x
      CacheNodeType: !Ref CacheNodeType
      NumCacheClusters: !Ref NumCacheNodes
      AutomaticFailoverEnabled: true
      MultiAZEnabled: true
      SnapshotRetentionLimit: !Ref SnapshotRetentionPeriod
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref CacheSubnetGroup
      AtRestEncryptionEnabled: true
      TransitEncryptionEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replication-group'

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-lt'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AmiId
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup

  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-asg'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: !Ref AsgMinSize
      MaxSize: !Ref AsgMaxSize
      DesiredCapacity: !Ref AsgDesiredCapacity
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-asg-instance'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  LambdaRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ElastiCacheModifyPolicy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - elasticache:ModifyReplicationGroup
              - elasticache:DescribeReplicationGroups
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:elasticache:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:replicationgroup/${ReplicationGroup}'

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-snapshot-manager'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          REPLICATION_GROUP_ID: !Ref ReplicationGroup
          SNAPSHOT_RETENTION_PERIOD: !Ref SnapshotRetentionPeriod
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import boto3
          import os
          import json

          def handler(event, context):
              client = boto3.client('elasticache')
              rep_group_id = os.environ['REPLICATION_GROUP_ID']
              retention_period = int(os.environ['SNAPSHOT_RETENTION_PERIOD'])
              enabled = event.get('enabled', True)
              target_retention = retention_period if enabled else 0

              try:
                  response = client.describe_replication_groups(ReplicationGroupIds=[rep_group_id])
                  current_retention = response['ReplicationGroups'][0].get('SnapshotRetentionLimit', 0)
              except Exception as e:
                  return {'statusCode': 500, 'error': str(e)}

              if current_retention != target_retention:
                  try:
                      client.modify_replication_group(
                          ReplicationGroupId=rep_group_id,
                          SnapshotRetentionLimit=target_retention
                      )
                      return {'statusCode': 200, 'message': f'Updated retention to {target_retention}'}
                  except Exception as e:
                      return {'statusCode': 500, 'error': str(e)}
              else:
                  return {'statusCode': 200, 'message': 'No change needed'}
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-lambda'

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  ASGName:
    Description: Auto Scaling Group Name
    Value: !Ref AutoScalingGroup
  ReplicationGroupEndpoint:
    Description: ElastiCache Replication Group Primary Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicationGroup.PrimaryEndPoint.Address
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Lambda Function Name for snapshot management
    Value: !Ref LambdaFunction
