final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket integrated with Amazon EventBridge and SNS to notify subscribers about object creation events. The template deploys an S3 bucket configured to send events to EventBridge, an SNS topic for message distribution, and an EventBridge rule that triggers on `Object Created` events from the bucket.

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ObjectCreatedTopic"
      TopicName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ObjectCreatedTopic"
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SNSPublishPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRole"
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: Rule to forward S3 Object Created events from the bucket to SNS topic
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - 'Object Created'
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - !Ref S3Bucket
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ObjectCreatedRule"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref SNSTopic
          Id: SNSTarget
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a real-time data ingestion and storage pipeline using Amazon Kinesis Data Stream and Kinesis Data Firehose, which delivers the data to an S3 bucket.'

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
  RetentionPeriodHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'kinesis-data'
  BufferSizeInMBs:
    Type: Number
    Default: 128
  BufferIntervalInSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 900
  FirehoseRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'kinesis-firehose-role'

Resources:
  DataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}::alias/aws/s3'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  DataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${DataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  FirehoseRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FirehoseRoleName
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseKinesisAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                Resource: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: FirehoseS3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                Resource: !Sub '${DataBucket}/*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    's3:x-amz-acl': 'bucket-owner-full-control'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub '${DataBucket}/*'

  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionPeriodHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}::alias/aws/kinesis'

  DataFirehose:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-firehose'
      DeliveryStreamType: KinesisStreamAsSource
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
      ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          SizeInMBs: !Ref BufferSizeInMBs
          IntervalInSeconds: !Ref BufferIntervalInSeconds
        Prefix: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-firehose/date=!{timestamp:yyyy/MM/dd/HH}/'
        ErrorOutputPrefix: 'error/'
        S3BackupMode: Enabled
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis-firehose/${AWS::StackName}-firehose'

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KinesisStreamArn'
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataFirehose.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseDeliveryStreamArn'
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 Bucket
    Value: !Ref DataBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  FirehoseRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Firehose IAM Role
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseRoleArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated monitoring and notification system for AWS Secrets Manager secret lifecycle events, which sends alerts via Amazon SNS when secrets are created, updated, or accessed.

Parameters:
  SnsTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecretsManagerLifecycleAlerts
    Description: Name for the SNS topic
  SubscriptionEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional email address to subscribe to the SNS topic for notifications. Leave empty to skip subscription creation.

Conditions:
  CreateSubscription: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SubscriptionEmail, '']]

Resources:
  DLQTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      TopicName: !Sub '${SnsTopicName}-DLQ'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref SnsTopicName
      DisplayName: Secrets Manager Lifecycle Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PublishToSNS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EventBridgeRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      State: ENABLED
      Description: Detects Secrets Manager lifecycle events (create, update, access) via CloudTrail and sends to SNS
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          eventSource:
            - secretsmanager.amazonaws.com
          eventName:
            - CreateSecret
            - UpdateSecret
            - PutSecretValue
            - RotateSecret
            - GetSecretValue
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref SNSTopic
          Id: SNSTarget
          InputTransformer:
            InputTemplate: '{"Subject": "Secrets Manager Event: <detail.eventName> on <detail.userIdentity.arn>", "Message": "<aws.events.event>"}'
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowEventBridgeToPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn

  Subscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: CreateSubscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref SubscriptionEmail
      FilterPolicy: {}
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      RedrivePolicy:
        Fn::Sub:
          - '{ "deadLetterTargetArn": "${DLQTopicArn}" }'
          - DLQTopicArn: !Ref DLQTopic

Outputs:
  SnsTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn
  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS subscription (if created)
    Condition: CreateSubscription
    Value: !Ref Subscription

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure parameter storage and retrieval workflows using SSM Parameter Store and Secrets Manager for serverless applications with centralized configuration management.'

Resources:
  AppNameParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/Config/AppName'
      Type: String
      Value: MyServerlessApp

  VersionParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/Config/Version'
      Type: String
      Value: '1.0.0'

  TestValueParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/Config/TestValue'
      Type: String
      Value: 'This is A/B'

  AppSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AppSecret'
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: 'password'
        PasswordLength: 20
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
        ExcludeCharacters: '!@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}|;:,.<>?'

  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogsPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/*:*'
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMReadPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${AWS::StackName}/Config/*'
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretsReadPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                  - secretsmanager:DescribeSecret
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${AWS::StackName}-AppSecret-*'

  DemoFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DemoFunction'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      MemorySize: 128
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              # Fetch SSM parameters by path
              try:
                  ssm = boto3.client('ssm')
                  namespace = os.environ['NAMESPACE']
                  response = ssm.get_parameters_by_path(
                      Path=namespace,
                      Recursive=True,
                      WithDecryption=True
                  )
                  params = {}
                  for param in response.get('Parameters', []):
                      key = param['Name'].rsplit('/', 1)[-1]
                      params[key] = param['Value']
                  print('Retrieved SSM Parameters:', json.dumps(params))
              except Exception as e:
                  print('SSM retrieval error:', str(e))

              # Fetch Secrets Manager secret
              try:
                  sm = boto3.client('secretsmanager')
                  secret_arn = os.environ['SECRET_ARN']
                  secret_response = sm.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_arn)
                  secret_dict = json.loads(secret_response['SecretString'])
                  print('Retrieved Secret:', json.dumps(secret_dict))
              except Exception as e:
                  print('Secrets Manager retrieval error:', str(e))

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Parameters and secret retrieved successfully')
              }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          NAMESPACE: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/Config/'
          SECRET_ARN: !Ref AppSecret

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: 'Name of the Lambda function demonstrating parameter retrieval'
    Value: !Ref DemoFunction
  SSMNamespace:
    Description: 'SSM Parameter Store namespace path for path-based retrieval'
    Value: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/Config/'
  AppSecretArn:
    Description: 'Name/Id of the Secrets Manager secret (use for get_secret_value decryption workflows)'
    Value: !Ref AppSecret

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Etherpad deployment pipeline with CodeDeploy, ASG, ALB, RDS, and SSM'

Metadata:
  Description: 'Automated deployment pipeline for Etherpad using AWS services'

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'dev'
    Description: 'Environment name for naming resources'
  DBUsername:
    Type: String
    MinLength: '8'
    Description: 'RDS master username'
  DBPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    MinLength: '8'
    Description: 'RDS master password'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: 't3.micro'
    AllowedValues:
      - 't3.micro'
      - 't3.small'
  KeyName:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName'
    Default: ''
    Description: 'EC2 KeyPair for SSH access (optional, SSM preferred)'

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair: !Not [ !Equals [ !Ref KeyName, '' ] ]

Resources:
  # Networking
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-VPC'
    Metadata:
      cfn-lint::ignoreme: 'Used in all downstream resources'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ '0', !GetAZs VPC ]
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ '1', !GetAZs VPC ]
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Security Groups
  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for ALB'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-ALBSG'

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EC2 instances'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 9001
          ToPort: 9001
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: '10.0.0.0/16'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-InstanceSG'

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for RDS'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-RDSSG'

  # Database
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: 'Public subnets for RDS (non-ideal but per spec)'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DBSubnetGroup'

  EtherpadRDS:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    DependsOn: RDSSecurityGroup
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.36'
      MasterUsername: !Ref DBUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref DBPassword
      DBName: etherpad
      AllocatedStorage: '20'
      StorageType: gp2
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DeletionProtection: true
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-RDS'

  # SSM Parameters
  EtherpadDBEndpointParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    DependsOn: EtherpadRDS
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/etherpad/db-endpoint'
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt EtherpadRDS.Endpoint.Address
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DBEndpointParam'

  EtherpadDBUserParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    DependsOn: EtherpadRDS
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/etherpad/db-user'
      Type: SecureString
      Value: !Ref DBUsername
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DBUserParam'

  EtherpadDBPasswordParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    DependsOn: EtherpadRDS
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/etherpad/db-password'
      Type: SecureString
      Value: !Ref DBPassword
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DBPasswordParam'

  # S3 Bucket
  ArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-artifacts'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
        - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
            SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      BucketPolicy:
        Fn::Sub:
          - |
            {
              "Version": "2012-10-17",
              "Statement": [
                {
                  "Sid": "DenyUnencrypted",
                  "Effect": "Deny",
                  "Principal": "*",
                  "Action": "s3:*",
                  "Resource": [
                    "${BucketArn}/*",
                    "${BucketArn}"
                  ],
                  "Condition": {
                    "Bool": {
                      "aws:SecureTransport": "false"
                    }
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
          - BucketArn: !GetAtt ArtifactsBucket.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-ArtifactsBucket'

  # IAM
  EtherpadEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2RoleforAWSCodeDeploy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EtherpadSSMParameters
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParameters
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/etherpad/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/aws/ssm'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EC2Role'

  EtherpadInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EtherpadEC2Role

  CodeDeployServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSCodeDeployRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-CodeDeployServiceRole'

  # Compute
  EtherpadLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt EtherpadInstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash -xe
            yum update -y
            yum install -y jq awscli amazon-ssm-agent git amazon-linux-extras
            systemctl daemon-reload
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
            REGION=$(curl -s 169.254.169.254/latest/dynamic/instance-identity/document | jq -r .region)
            aws s3 cp s3://aws-codedeploy-${REGION}/latest/install /tmp/install --region $REGION
            chmod +x /tmp/install
            /tmp/install auto
            systemctl enable codedeploy-agent
            systemctl start codedeploy-agent
            amazon-linux-extras install -y nodejs18
            mkdir -p /opt/etherpad
            cd /opt/etherpad
            git clone https://github.com/ether/etherpad-lite.git .
            DB_ENDPOINT=$(aws ssm get-parameters --region $REGION --names /etherpad/db-endpoint --with-decryption --query "Parameters[0].Value" --output text)
            DB_USER=$(aws ssm get-parameters --region $REGION --names /etherpad/db-user --with-decryption --query "Parameters[0].Value" --output text)
            DB_PASS=$(aws ssm get-parameters --region $REGION --names /etherpad/db-password --with-decryption --query "Parameters[0].Value" --output text)
            cat > settings.json << EOF
            {
              "dbType" : "mysql",
              "dbSettings" : {
                "user"    : "${DB_USER}",
                "password": "${DB_PASS}",
                "host"    : "${DB_ENDPOINT}",
                "port"    : 3306,
                "database": "etherpad",
                "charset" : "utf8mb4"
              },
              "trustProxy" : true,
              "port" : 9001
            }
            EOF
            npm install
            nohup bin/run.sh > /var/log/etherpad.log 2>&1 &
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: instance
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-Instance'

  EtherpadASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    DependsOn:
      - EtherpadLaunchTemplate
      - EtherpadTargetGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier: !Join [ ',', [ !Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2 ] ]
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref EtherpadLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt EtherpadLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '2'
      MaxSize: '4'
      DesiredCapacity: '2'
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref EtherpadTargetGroup
      HealthCheckType: ELB
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-ASG'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # ALB
  EtherpadALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-ALB'
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Type: application
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-ALB'

  EtherpadTargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-TG'
      Port: 9001
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckPath: /api/
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 30
      HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds: 5
      HealthyThresholdCount: 2
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-TG'

  EtherpadListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    DependsOn: EtherpadALB
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref EtherpadALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref EtherpadTargetGroup

  # Monitoring
  EtherpadScaleOutPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref EtherpadASG
      PolicyType: SimpleScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      ScalingAdjustment: 1
      Cooldown: 300

  EtherpadScaleInPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref EtherpadASG
      PolicyType: SimpleScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      ScalingAdjustment: -1
      Cooldown: 300

  EtherpadHighCPUAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-HighCPU'
      AlarmDescription: 'Scale-out if CPU > 70% for 2 periods'
      MetricName: CPUUtilization
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 70
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: AutoScalingGroupName
          Value: !Ref EtherpadASG
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref EtherpadScaleOutPolicy

  EtherpadLowCPUAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-LowCPU'
      AlarmDescription: 'Scale-in if CPU < 30% for 2 periods'
      MetricName: CPUUtilization
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 30
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: AutoScalingGroupName
          Value: !Ref EtherpadASG
      OKActions:
        - !Ref EtherpadScaleInPolicy

  # Pipeline
  EtherpadCodeDeployApp:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::Application
    Properties:
      ComputePlatform: Server
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-CodeDeployApp'

  EtherpadDeploymentGroup:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::DeploymentGroup
    DependsOn:
      - EtherpadASG
      - EtherpadCodeDeployApp
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Ref EtherpadCodeDeployApp
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt CodeDeployServiceRole.Arn
      DeploymentGroupName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DeploymentGroup'
      AutoScalingGroups:
        - !Ref EtherpadASG
      DeploymentConfigName: CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime
      LoadBalancerInfo:
        TargetGroupInfoList:
          - Name: !Ref EtherpadTargetGroup

Outputs:
  ALBDNSName:
    Description: ALB DNS Name
    Value: !GetAtt EtherpadALB.DNSName

  ASGName:
    Description: ASG Name
    Value: !Ref EtherpadASG

  RDSEndpoint:
    Description: RDS Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt EtherpadRDS.Endpoint.Address

  ArtifactsBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for Artifacts
    Value: !Ref ArtifactsBucket

  CodeDeployAppName:
    Description: CodeDeploy Application Name
    Value: !Ref EtherpadCodeDeployApp

  DeploymentGroupName:
    Description: CodeDeploy Deployment Group Name
    Value: !Ref EtherpadDeploymentGroup

  DBEndpointSSMParam:
    Description: SSM Parameter ARN for DB Endpoint
    Value: !Ref EtherpadDBEndpointParam

  DBUserSSMParam:
    Description: SSM Parameter ARN for DB User
    Value: !Ref EtherpadDBUserParam

  DBPasswordSSMParam:
    Description: SSM Parameter ARN for DB Password
    Value: !Ref EtherpadDBPasswordParam

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Sample Lambda Function Template'

Resources:
  LambdaSampleRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaSample

  SampleLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': 'Hello, World!'
              }
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaSampleRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      MemorySize: 128
      Timeout: 3
      Environment:
        Variables:
          SAMPLE_ENV: production
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaSample

  SampleLambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      FunctionName: !Ref SampleLambdaFunction
      Principal: '*'

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !Ref SampleLambdaFunction
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn
  LambdaInvokeArn:
    Description: Invoke ARN of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template creating two IAM Roles and Instance Profiles for EC2 instances granting read-only access to IAM resources via IAMReadOnlyAccess managed policy.

Resources:
  # First IAM Role with EC2 trust and IAMReadOnlyAccess policy
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess

  # Instance Profile associated with first role
  EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile1:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: EC2IAMReadOnlyProfile1
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1

  # Second IAM Role identical to the first
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "MySQL RDS (db.r5.large, io1) in isolated VPC with private subnets"

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  Subnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  Subnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: "mydatabase"
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: "admin"
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
  Iops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3000
    MinValue: 1000
    MaxValue: 16000

Resources:
  PrivateVpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref PrivateVpc
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref PrivateVpc
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref PrivateVpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group"
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Private subnets for RDS MySQL across AZs"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RdsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for MySQL RDS allowing port 3306 from VPC internal traffic"
      VpcId: !Ref PrivateVpc
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MySQLDBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql"
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: "8.0.45"
      DBInstanceClass: "db.r5.large"
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref Iops
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RdsSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MultiAZ: false
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      StorageEncrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  RdsEndpoint:
    Description: "MySQL RDS endpoint for internal VPC connections"
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLDBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref PrivateVpc
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  DBSubnetGroupName:
    Value: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a publicly accessible MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) with automated backups enabled, in a VPC with two public subnets across different Availability Zones, Internet Gateway, Route Table, and basic security group for external connectivity.'

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 16
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*'
    Description: Master username for the RDS instance.
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydatabase
    Description: The initial database name.
  BackupRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 35
    Description: Number of days to retain automated backups.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: 'Public subnets for RDS instance with external connectivity'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  RdsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for MySQL RDS allowing inbound 3306 from 0.0.0.0/0'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          FromPort: 3306
          IpProtocol: tcp
          ToPort: 3306
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          IpProtocol: -1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDS-SG'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionPeriod
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      DeletionProtection: false
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      EnablePerformanceInsights: false
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      StorageEncrypted: true
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RdsSecurityGroup
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
        - general
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBInstance'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: MySQL endpoint for client connections
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  VPCId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
  SubnetIds:
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
  RDSMasterUserSecretArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing the master user password
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.MasterUserSecret.SecretArn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Deploys a securely isolated MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) in a VPC with private subnets, custom parameter group, and AWS Secrets Manager for credential management and rotation."

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydb
    NoEcho: false
    Description: "The database name"
  DBUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
    NoEcho: false
    Description: "The database admin username"
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: "CIDR block for VPC"
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: "CIDR block for private subnet 1"
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: "CIDR block for private subnet 2"
  AdminAccessFromCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: "CIDR allowed to access the RDS instance"

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-1"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-2"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub "${AWS::StackName} DB subnet group"
      SubnetIds:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure S3 buckets with encryption, logging, and HTTPS enforcement'

Resources:
  AccessLogBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}-accesslogs-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-accesslogs'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Security
          Value: Compliant

  ReplicaBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogBucket
        LogFilePrefix: logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Security
          Value: Compliant

  ReplicaBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicaBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${ReplicaBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${ReplicaBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  AccessLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${AccessLogBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${AccessLogBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowLoggingFromReplicaBucket
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt ReplicaBucket.Arn

Outputs:
  ReplicaBucketName:
    Description: Name of the ReplicaBucket
    Value: !Ref ReplicaBucket
  ReplicaBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the ReplicaBucket
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicaBucket.Arn
  AccessLogBucketName:
    Description: Name of the AccessLogBucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogBucket
  AccessLogBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the AccessLogBucket
    Value: !GetAtt AccessLogBucket.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket with server-side encryption, versioning, public access block, HTTPS-only bucket policy, IAM role for Lambda, Lambda function, permission, and S3 notification trigger on .txt object creation.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: trigger-bucket-
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  LambdaTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 900
    Description: Lambda function timeout in seconds

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Function: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn
            Filter:
              S3Key:
                Rules:
                  - Name: suffix
                    Value: .txt

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'S3TriggerLambdaExecutionRole-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600

  S3AccessRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket}/*'

  S3TriggerLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub 'S3TriggerLambda-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              print(event)
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
              }
      Timeout: !Ref LambdaTimeout
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref S3TriggerLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn
  TestCommand:
    Description: 'Test the trigger: Create a test.txt file and run: aws s3 cp test.txt s3://'
    Value: !Sub 'aws s3 cp test.txt s3://${S3Bucket}/test.txt'

Description: 'CloudFormation template for an Amazon ECR repository with repository policy granting AWS account root user permissions for Kubernetes container image management.'

Resources:
  KubernetesImageRepo:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-k8s-repo'
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      ImageTagMutability: MUTABLE
      EncryptionConfiguration:
        EncryptionType: AES256
      RepositoryPolicyText: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "KubernetesImageLifecycle",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": [
                "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer",
                "ecr:BatchGetImage",
                "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability",
                "ecr:PutImage",
                "ecr:InitiateLayerUpload",
                "ecr:UploadLayerPart",
                "ecr:CompleteLayerUpload",
                "ecr:DescribeRepositories",
                "ecr:ListImages",
                "ecr:BatchDeleteImage",
                "ecr:DeleteRepository"
              ],
              "Condition": {
                "Bool": {
                  "aws:SecureTransport": "true"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: KubernetesContainerImages
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  RepositoryUri:
    Description: URI of the ECR repository
    Value: !GetAtt KubernetesImageRepo.RepositoryUri
  RepositoryArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECR repository
    Value: !GetAtt KubernetesImageRepo.Arn

Description: 'Deploys a secure SQS FIFO queue with Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) support.'

Parameters:
  QueueNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyFifoQueue

Resources:
  PrimaryFifoQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}.fifo'
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterFifoQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${QueueNamePrefix}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DeadLetterFifoQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}-DLQ.fifo'
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${QueueNamePrefix}-DLQ'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  PrimaryQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the primary FIFO queue for integration'
    Value: !Ref PrimaryFifoQueue
  PrimaryQueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the primary FIFO queue for integration and monitoring'
    Value: !GetAtt PrimaryFifoQueue.Arn
  DLQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the Dead Letter FIFO queue for monitoring'
    Value: !Ref DeadLetterFifoQueue
  DLQueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Dead Letter FIFO queue for integration and monitoring'
    Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterFifoQueue.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure SQS Standard Queue with encryption and access policies.

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: StandardQueue
  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev

Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Queue'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSendReceiveDeleteGetQueueAttributes
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Standard Queue.
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue
  QueueArn:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with two public subnets and one private subnet spread across two Availability Zones using AZ indexing to pin resources to consistent AZs.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '1'
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.3.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnetAId:
    Description: 'ID of Public Subnet A in AZ1'
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetAId'

  PublicSubnetBId:
    Description: 'ID of Public Subnet B in AZ2'
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetBId'

  PrivateSubnetAId:
    Description: 'ID of Private Subnet A in AZ1'
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetAId'

  AZ1:
    Description: 'Availability Zone 1'
    Value:
      Fn::Select:
        - '0'
        - !GetAZs ''
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ1'

  AZ2:
    Description: 'Availability Zone 2'
    Value:
      Fn::Select:
        - '1'
        - !GetAZs ''
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AZ2'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'This template provisions an encrypted S3 bucket with KMS integration and lifecycle management.'

Parameters:
  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: encrypted-bucket
  KeyAliasName:
    Type: String
    Default: alias/s3-encrypted-key
  EnvironmentTag:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
  TransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
  ExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365

Resources:
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Encrypted storage with lifecycle

  KeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub '${KeyAliasName}'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  EncryptedBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EncryptionKey
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: LifecycleRule1
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
          - Id: LifecycleRule2
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: 90
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Encrypted storage with lifecycle

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref EncryptedBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedObjectUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject*'
            Resource: !Sub '${EncryptedBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'aws:kms'
          - Sid: DenyIncorrectKMSKey
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject*'
            Resource: !Sub '${EncryptedBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-kms-key-id': !Ref EncryptionKey
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject*'
            Resource: !Sub '${EncryptedBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref EncryptedBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt EncryptedBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key
    Value: !Ref EncryptionKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyArn'
  KeyAliasName:
    Description: Name of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref KeyAlias
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KeyAliasName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream with server-side encryption using AWS managed KMS key and destination delivery error logging to CloudWatch Logs.'

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'default-firehose-stream'
    Description: 'Name of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.'
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'fh-delivery-'
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name to ensure global uniqueness.'
  LogRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14
    Description: 'Retention period in days for the CloudWatch Log Group.'

Resources:
  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix} Firehose Bucket'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Bucket'

  LogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis-firehose/${StreamName}'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '/aws/kinesis-firehose/${StreamName}'
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'Kinesis Data Firehose Error Log Group'

  LogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup
      LogStreamName: 'DestinationDeliveryErrors'

  FirehoseServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'FirehoseServiceRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'firehose.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'FirehoseDeliveryPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${LogGroup}:*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${LogGroup}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'FirehoseServiceRole'
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'Kinesis Data Firehose Service Role'

  DeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Ref StreamName
      ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseServiceRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          SizeInMBs: 1
          IntervalInSeconds: 60
        S3BackupMode: Disabled
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref LogStream
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: 'AWS_OWNED_CMK'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref StreamName
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream'

Outputs:
  DeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream'
    Value: !GetAtt DeliveryStream.Arn
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket used as the Firehose delivery destination'
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  LogGroupArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the CloudWatch Log Group used for destination delivery error logging'
    Value: !GetAtt LogGroup.Arn
  FirehoseServiceRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role used by the Firehose service for delivery and logging permissions'
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseServiceRole.Arn
