AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a VPC with a single public subnet, Internet Gateway, and associated routing infrastructure to enable internet accessibility for resources. Designed for foundational networking in demonstrations like CloudWatch EC2 auto-alarms.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  InternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  SubnetId:
    Description: The ID of the public subnet
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubnetId'

  RouteTableId:
    Description: The ID of the public route table
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RouteTableId'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: The ID of the Internet Gateway
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGatewayId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an Amazon S3 bucket that can be made accessible to an entire AWS Organization or Organization Unit. Allows flexibility for single-account use (when no Organization ID is given) or enterprise-wide access.'
Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: shared-bucket-
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
  OrganizationalUnitPath:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
Conditions:
  UseOrgAccess: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, '']]
  UseOuAccess: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationalUnitPath, '']]
Resources:
  SharedBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
  BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref SharedBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Ref SharedBucket
              - !Sub '${SharedBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: BucketOwnerFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Ref SharedBucket
              - !Sub '${SharedBucket}/*'
          - !If
            - UseOrgAccess
            - Sid: OrgReadAccess
              Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action:
                - 's3:ListBucket'
                - 's3:GetObject'
              Resource:
                - !Ref SharedBucket
                - !Sub '${SharedBucket}/*'
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
          - !If
            - UseOuAccess
            - Sid: OuReadAccess
              Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action:
                - 's3:ListBucket'
                - 's3:GetObject'
              Resource:
                - !Ref SharedBucket
                - !Sub '${SharedBucket}/*'
              Condition:
                StringLike:
                  'aws:PrincipalOrgPaths': !Sub '${OrganizationalUnitPath}/*'
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the created S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref SharedBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the created S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
  AccessConfiguration:
    Description: 'Configured access scope for the bucket'
    Value: !If
      - UseOrgAccess
      - !Sub 'Organization-wide access (ID: ${OrganizationId})'
      - !If
        - UseOuAccess
        - !Sub 'Organizational Unit access (Path: ${OrganizationalUnitPath})'
        - 'Single-account access only'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-9638c315' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-9638c315: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SharedBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SharedBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-9638c315: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template creating a VPC, Security Group, S3 Bucket with encryption and policy, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection, PITR, and SSE.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security Group with no inbound rules and outbound HTTPS only'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-secure-example-bucket"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-secure-example-table"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: pk
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sk
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: pk
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sk
          KeyType: RANGE

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public subnets (auto-assign public IP), two private subnets, public route table with Internet Gateway route, private route table, and route table associations for subnet isolation.'

Resources:
  VPC:

        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:

  PublicSubnet1:

    Properties:

          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            Fn::Sub:

      Tags:
        - Key: Name

            Fn::Sub:

  PrivateSubnet2:

        - Key: Environment

  PublicRouteTable:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a secure, web-based VS Code development environment using code-server on Ubuntu 22.04 EC2, accessible via CloudFront with SSM management. Demo use only.'
Parameters:
  CodeServerVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: '4.22.1'
    Description: 'code-server version to install'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: 't3.micro'
    Description: 'EC2 instance type'
  PrefixListId:
    Type: String
    Default: 'pl-0fcd00a1'
    Description: 'Regional CloudFront origin-facing IPv4 managed prefix list ID (e.g., run: aws ec2 describe-managed-prefix-lists --filters "Name=prefix-list-name,Values=com.amazonaws.global.cloudfront.origin-facing" --query "PrefixLists[0].PrefixListId")'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
  AttachIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '0'
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'
  PublicRT:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRT
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW
  PublicRTAssoc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRT
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-role'
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole
  SG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for code-server EC2 instance'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          SourcePrefixListId: !Ref PrefixListId
          Description: 'Allow CloudFront to code-server port 8080'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
          Description: 'Allow all outbound traffic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'
  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: AttachIGW
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eip'
  EC2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/canonical/ubuntu/server/22.04/stable/current/amd64/hvm/ebs-gp3/ami-id}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SG
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-code-server'
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -ex
          apt-get update -y
          apt-get upgrade -y
          apt-get install -y curl wget unzip python3-pip nodejs npm
          # Install cfn-bootstrap for signaling
          curl -o /tmp/aws-cfn-bootstrap-py3.tar.gz https://s3.amazonaws.com/cloudformation-examples/aws-cfn-bootstrap-py3.tar.gz
          tar -xzf /tmp/aws-cfn-bootstrap-py3.tar.gz -C /tmp
          python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir /tmp/aws-cfn-bootstrap-*
          rm -rf /tmp/aws-cfn-bootstrap* /tmp/aws-cfn*
          # Install code-server
          mkdir -p /opt/code-server
          cd /opt/code-server
          wget https://github.com/coder/code-server/releases/download/v${CodeServerVersion}/code-server-${CodeServerVersion}-linux-amd64.tar.gz
          tar -xzf code-server-${CodeServerVersion}-linux-amd64.tar.gz --strip-components=1
          rm code-server-${CodeServerVersion}-linux-amd64.tar.gz
          ln -sf /opt/code-server/bin/code-server /usr/local/bin/code-server
          chmod +x /usr/local/bin/code-server
          # Create systemd service
          cat > /etc/systemd/system/code-server.service << EOF
          [Unit]
          Description=code-server
          After=network.target
          [Service]
          Type=simple
          ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth none
          Restart=always
          RestartSec=3
          Environment=PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
          [Install]
          WantedBy=multi-user.target
          EOF
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable code-server
          systemctl start code-server
          # Wait for code-server to be healthy
          until curl -f http://localhost:8080/healthz; do
            echo "Waiting for code-server..."
            sleep 5
          done
          # Signal success
          /usr/local/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2 --region ${AWS::Region}
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
  OneYearCachePolicy:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::CachePolicy
    Properties:
      CachePolicyConfig:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OneYearCachePolicy'
        Comment: 'Custom cache policy with 1-year TTL'
        MinTTL: 0
        DefaultTTL: 31536000
        MaxTTL: 31536000
        ParametersInCacheKeyAndForwardedToOrigin:
          EnableAcceptEncodingGzip: true
          CookiesConfig:
            CookieBehavior: all
          HeadersConfig:
            HeaderBehavior: none
          QueryStringsConfig:
            QueryStringBehavior: all
  CloudFront:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DependsOn: EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
        Origins:
          - Id: EC2Origin
            DomainName: !GetAtt EIP.PublicIp
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPPort: 8080
              HTTPSPort: 443
              OriginProtocolPolicy: http-only
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: EC2Origin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PUT
            - POST
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          Compress: true
          CachePolicyId: !Ref OneYearCachePolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cloudfront'
Outputs:
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: 'CloudFront domain name. Access VS Code at https://[this value]'
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFront.DomainName
  CloudFrontURL:
    Description: 'Full HTTPS URL for the VS Code environment'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CloudFront.DomainName}'
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 instance ID'
    Value: !Ref EC2
  InstancePublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the EC2 instance (EIP)'
    Value: !GetAtt EIP.PublicIp
  EIPAllocationId:
    Description: 'EIP allocation ID'
    Value: !Ref EIP
  SSMStartSessionCommand:
    Description: 'Command to start SSM session to the instance (ensure AWS CLI and Session Manager plugin installed)'
    Value: !Sub 'aws ssm start-session --target ${EC2}'

Description: 'ECS Cluster with Fargate and Fargate Spot capacity providers'

Parameters:

    Type: String
    Default: FargateCluster
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][-a-zA-Z0-9]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$'
    ConstraintDescription: Name of the ECS cluster (1-255 characters, alphanumeric with hyphens, cannot start or end with hyphen)

    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Ref ClusterName
      ClusterSettings:
        - Name: containerInsights
      CapacityProviders:
        - FARGATE_SPOT
        - FARGATE
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE_SPOT
          Weight: 1
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE
          Weight: 1
          Base: 1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  ClusterArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS cluster
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  ClusterName:
    Value: !Ref ClusterName
  FargateCapacityProvider:
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "ECS Fargate Task Definition for NGINX demo with ECS Exec (SSM session management), task/execution roles, and CloudWatch Logs (7-day retention)."

Resources:
  FargateTaskExecutionRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      RoleName: "FargateTaskExecutionRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "NGINXFargateDemo"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  FargateTaskRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      RoleName: "FargateTaskRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "ECSExecSSM"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel"
                  - "ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel"
                  - "ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel"
                  - "ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel"
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "NGINXFargateDemo"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  NginxLogGroup:
    Type: "AWS::Logs::LogGroup"
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: "/ecs/nginx-container-logs"
      RetentionInDays: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "NGINXFargateDemo"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  NginxFargateTaskDefinition:
    Type: "AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition"
    Properties:
      Family: "nginx-fargate-task"
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - "FARGATE"
      NetworkMode: "awsvpc"
      Cpu: "256"
      Memory: "512"
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt "FargateTaskExecutionRole.Arn"
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt "FargateTaskRole.Arn"
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: "nginx"
          Image: "nginx:latest"
          Essential: true
          ReadonlyRootFilesystem: false
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              Protocol: "tcp"
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: "awslogs"
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref "NginxLogGroup"
              awslogs-region: !Sub "${AWS::Region}"
              awslogs-stream-prefix: "nginx"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "NGINXFargateDemo"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Provisions a Windows EC2 instance for CPU stress testing via SSM and FIS integration.

Parameters:
  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Default: 'ami-0c02fb55956c7d316'
    Description: LocalStack-compatible static AMI ID (us-east-1 Windows Server 2019); override with SSM-resolved latest ('/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base') via parameter input for production dynamism.
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    Default: t3.small
  SubnetId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|subnet-[0-9a-f]{8,17}'
    ConstraintDescription: Subnet ID (subnet-XXXXXXXXX) or empty string for default subnet in default VPC.
  TestDurationMinutes:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 60
    Default: 5

Conditions:
  UseCustomSubnet: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SubnetId, '']]

Resources:
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role
  InstanceSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} CPU Stress Test SG'
  WindowsInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSG
      SubnetId: !If [UseCustomSubnet, !Ref SubnetId, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WindowsInstance'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CPU Stress Testing
  CpuStressDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CpuStressTest'
      DocumentType: 'Command'
      DocumentFormat: 'YAML'
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: Simulate CPU stress by spawning threads equal to the instance's logical processors for a configurable duration.
        parameters:
          DurationMinutes:
            type: String
            default: '5'
            description: '(Required) Duration of stress test in minutes (1-60).'
            allowedPattern: '^(1[0-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-9]|4[0-9]|5[0-9]|60|[1-9])$'
        mainSteps:
          - action: aws:runPowerShellScript
            name: stressCpu
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - '$DurationSeconds = [int]{{ DurationMinutes }} * 60'
                - '$numCores = (Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_Processor | Measure-Object -Property NumberOfLogicalProcessors -Sum).Sum'
                - 'Write-Output "Detected $numCores logical processors. Starting CPU stress test for {{ DurationMinutes }} minutes ($DurationSeconds seconds)."'
                - '$jobs = @()'
                - '1..$numCores | ForEach-Object { $jobs += Start-Job -ScriptBlock { while ($true) { $null = 1 / 0.1 } } }'
                - 'Start-Sleep -Seconds $DurationSeconds'
                - '$jobs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Job -Job $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Receive-Job -Job $_ -Keep -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Remove-Job -Job $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }'
                - 'Write-Output "CPU stress test completed after $DurationSeconds seconds."'
  FISRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FISRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: fis.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FISInlinePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:ListCommandInvocations
                Resource:
                  - !Sub
                    - 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:document/${DocName}'
                    - DocName: !Ref CpuStressDocument
                  - !Sub
                    - 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:managed-instance/${InstanceId}'
                    - InstanceId: !Ref WindowsInstance
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  WindowsInstance:
    Description: WindowsInstance ID
    Value: !Ref WindowsInstance
  CpuStressDocument:
    Description: CpuStressDocument Name
    Value: !Ref CpuStressDocument
  FISRole:
    Description: FISRole ARN
    Value: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn
  InstanceSG:
    Description: InstanceSG GroupId
    Value: !Ref InstanceSG
  TestDurationMinutesValue:
    Description: Default SSM document test duration
    Value: !Ref TestDurationMinutes

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template providing tiered IAM roles for FIS access controls: SecurityAdmin (full), Admin (deny prod), User (limited, deny prod), Non-User (deny FIS). All roles include ReadOnlyAccess and conditional PassRole to FIS service roles.'

Parameters:
  WorkshopRolePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: FISWorkshop

Resources:
  FISSecurityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISSecurityAdminRole
      Path: /FIS/
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessTier
        - Key: Tier
          Value: SecurityAdmin

  SecAdminFISFullAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISSecurityAdminRole
      PolicyName: FISFullAccess
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFISFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action: fis:*
            Resource: '*'

  SecAdminPassWorkshopRolesPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISSecurityAdminRole
      PolicyName: PassWorkshopRoles
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPassWorkshopRoles
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:PassRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'

  SecAdminCreateServiceLinkedRolesPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISSecurityAdminRole
      PolicyName: CreateServiceLinkedRoles
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCreateServiceLinkedRole
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
            Resource: 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/*'

  SecAdminConditionalPassToFISPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISSecurityAdminRole
      PolicyName: ConditionalPassToFIS
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPassFISServiceRole
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:PassRole
            Resource: 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:ResourceTag/Workshop': "true"
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true

  FISAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISAdminRole
      Path: /FIS/
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessTier
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Admin

  AdminFISAdminAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISAdminRole
      PolicyName: FISAdminAccess
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFISAdminAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action: fis:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyFISProdAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Action: fis:*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': "prod"

  AdminPassWorkshopRolesAdminPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISAdminRole
      PolicyName: PassWorkshopRolesAdmin
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPassWorkshopRolesAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:PassRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:RequestedRegion': !Ref AWS::Region

  AdminConditionalPassToFISPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISAdminRole
      PolicyName: ConditionalPassToFIS
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPassFISServiceRole
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:PassRole
            Resource: 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:ResourceTag/Workshop': "true"
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true

  FISUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISUserRole
      Path: /FIS/
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessTier
        - Key: Tier
          Value: User

  UserFISUserLimitedPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISUserRole
      PolicyName: FISUserLimited
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLimitedFISActions
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - fis:GetExperiment*
              - fis:ListExperiments
              - fis:ListTagsForResource
              - fis:StartExperiment
              - fis:StopExperiment
              - fis:TagResource
              - fis:UntagResource
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyFISProdAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Action: fis:*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': "prod"

  UserPassWorkshopRolesUserPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISUserRole
      PolicyName: PassWorkshopRolesUser
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPassWorkshopRolesUser
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:PassRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': "prod"

  UserConditionalPassToFISPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISUserRole
      PolicyName: ConditionalPassToFIS
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPassFISServiceRole
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:PassRole
            Resource: 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:ResourceTag/Workshop': "true"
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true

  FISNonUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISNonUserRole
      Path: /FIS/
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FISAccessTier
        - Key: Tier
          Value: NonUser

  NonUserDenyFISAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISNonUserRole
      PolicyName: DenyFISAccess
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyAllFISAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Action: fis:*
            Resource: '*'

  NonUserConditionalPassToFISPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::RolePolicy
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref FISNonUserRole
      PolicyName: ConditionalPassToFIS
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPassFISServiceRole
            Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:PassRole
            Resource: 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:ResourceTag/Workshop': "true"
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true

Outputs:
  FISSecurityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the FIS Security Admin Role
    Value: !GetAtt FISSecurityAdminRole.Arn
  FISAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the FIS Admin Role
    Value: !GetAtt FISAdminRole.Arn
  FISUserRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the FIS User Role
    Value: !GetAtt FISUserRole.Arn
  FISNonUserRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the FIS Non-User Role
    Value: !GetAtt FISNonUserRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Deploys environment-specific DynamoDB tables for SupporterProductData with PROD provisioned capacity and write auto-scaling, and CODE on-demand billing. Includes SSE encryption, TTL on expiryDate, PITR backups, and tags."

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - PROD
      - CODE
    Default: CODE
    Description: "Environment stage: PROD for provisioned throughput with write auto-scaling (20 RCU/5 WCU initial, min 5/max 500), CODE for on-demand PAY_PER_REQUEST billing."

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, "PROD"]

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "SupporterProductData-${Stage}"
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: SupporterId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: ProductId
          KeyType: RANGE
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: SupporterId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: ProductId
          AttributeType: S
      BillingMode: !If [IsProd, "PROVISIONED", "PAY_PER_REQUEST"]
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If
        - IsProd
        - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
          WriteCapacityUnits: 5
        - !Ref "AWS::NoValue"
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: "expiryDate"
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SupporterProductData"
        - Key: Backup
          Value: "true"
        - Key: Stage
          Value: !Ref Stage

  WriteScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      MaxCapacity: 500
      MinCapacity: 5
      ResourceId: !Sub "table/${SupporterProductDataTable}"
      ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
      ServiceNamespace: dynamodb

  WriteTargetTrackingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    DependsOn: WriteScalableTarget
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub "${SupporterProductDataTable}-WriteTargetTrackingPolicy"
      PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
      ResourceId: !Sub "table/${SupporterProductDataTable}"
      ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
      ServiceNamespace: dynamodb
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization
        TargetValue: 70.0
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60
        ScaleInCooldown: 60

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: "Name of the SupporterProductData DynamoDB table"
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TableName"
  TableArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SupporterProductData DynamoDB table"
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TableArn"
  BillingMode:
    Description: "Billing mode of the SupporterProductData DynamoDB table (PROVISIONED or PAY_PER_REQUEST)"
    Value: !If [IsProd, "PROVISIONED", "PAY_PER_REQUEST"]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BillingMode"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys EC2 IPAM for centralized IP address allocation management with default scope exports

Resources:
  IPAM:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAM
    Properties:
      Description: Central IP Address Manager for VPC and subnet allocations
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IPAM"
      OperatingRegions:
        - RegionName: !Sub "${AWS::Region}"

  PrivateScope:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAMScope
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref IPAM

  PublicScope:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAMScope
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref IPAM

Outputs:
  IPAMId:
    Description: IPAM resource ID for cross-stack references
    Value: !Ref IPAM
  IPAMArn:
    Description: IPAM ARN for policy attachments and references
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.Arn
  PrivateScopeId:
    Description: Default private IPAM scope ID for VPC/subnet IPAM pool associations
    Value: !Ref PrivateScope
  PublicScopeId:
    Description: Default public IPAM scope ID for public IP management
    Value: !Ref PublicScope

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template creating three IAM managed policies: S3 access for iOS app, DynamoDB protection, and RDS protection.'

Resources:
  S3AccessForIOSAppPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: S3AccessForIOSAppPolicy
      Description: 'Grants an iOS application read/write access to the S3 bucket ios-apps.sagebridge.org, including object operations (upload, download, delete) and bucket listing/location permissions.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org/*'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
      Description: 'Explicitly denies deletion or schema-modification actions (e.g., DeleteTable, UpdateTable) to prevent accidental data loss in DynamoDB.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: '*'

    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: RDSProtectionPolicy
      Description: 'Blocks destructive RDS operations (e.g., DeleteDBInstance, DeleteDBCluster) to safeguard databases and backups.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:

    Description: ARN of the S3 Access Policy for iOS App
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/S3AccessForIOSAppPolicy'
    Export:

    Export:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "IAM Role for Amazon Bedrock Agent service runtime, assumable only by Bedrock service in the same account. Grants permissions to invoke foundation models and Lambda functions for custom logic integration, scoped to Bedrock agent resources."

Resources:
  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      RoleName: "BedrockAgentServiceRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "bedrock.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SourceAccount":
                  Ref: "AWS::AccountId"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "BedrockAgentPermissions"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "bedrock:InvokeModel"
                  - "bedrock:InvokeModelWithResponseStream"
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}::foundation-model/*"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "lambda:InvokeFunction"
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:*"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "bedrock:InvokeAgent"
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "Bedrock Agent Service Role"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a Resource Group for tagged resources across EC2, RDS, SageMaker, SSM, and other services.'

Parameters:
  GroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyResourceGroup
  TagKey:
    Type: String
    Default: Environment
  TagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: Production

Resources:
  ResourceGroup:
    Type: AWS::ResourceGroups::Group
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref GroupName
      Description: !Sub 'Resources tagged with ${TagKey} ${TagValue} across multiple AWS services.'
      ResourceQuery:
        Type: TAG_FILTERS_1_0
        Query:
          TagFilters:
            - Key: !Ref TagKey
              Values: [!Ref TagValue]
          ResourceTypeFilters:
            - AWS::EC2::Instance
            - AWS::RDS::DBInstance
            - AWS::RDS::DBCluster
            - AWS::SageMaker::NotebookInstance
            - AWS::SageMaker::Domain
            - AWS::SSM::ManagedInstance
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref TagValue

Outputs:
  ResourceGroupName:
    Description: The name of the Resource Group
    Value: !Ref ResourceGroup
  ResourceGroupArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Resource Group
    Value: !GetAtt ResourceGroup.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an encrypted S3 bucket (ALBAccessLogsBucket) compliant with AWS requirements for ALB access logging, featuring private access, enforced bucket ownership, server-side encryption, 90-day retention policy, and bucket policy for ELB and log delivery.'

Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketNamePrefix: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-alb-access-logs-bucket'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DeleteOldLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-alb-access-logs-bucket'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'ALB Access Logs'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: AllowELBAccount1
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 'arn:aws:iam::127311923021:root'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
          - Sid: AllowELBAccount2
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 'arn:aws:iam::033596210902:root'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
          - Sid: AllowELBAccount3
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 'arn:aws:iam::438234365698:root'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the ALB Access Logs Bucket'
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ALB Access Logs Bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys an AWS Transit Gateway with predefined BGP settings (ASN 65000), automatic attachment acceptance, default route propagation/association, and a RAM resource share for cross-account network connectivity across multiple VPCs and AWS accounts.
Parameters:
  TargetAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '644519422710'
    Description: Target AWS account ID to share the Transit Gateway with via RAM.
Resources:
  TransitGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::TransitGateway
    Properties:
      AmazonSideAsn: 65000
      AutoAcceptSharedAttachments: enable
      DefaultRouteTableAssociation: enable
      DefaultRouteTablePropagation: enable
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGateway'
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: StackId
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackId
  ResourceShare:
    Type: AWS::RAM::ResourceShare
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TGWShare'
      AllowExternalPrincipals: false
      Principals:
        - !Ref TargetAccountId
      ResourceArns:
        - !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:transit-gateway/${TransitGateway}'
Outputs:
  TransitGatewayId:
    Description: ID of the Transit Gateway
    Value: !Ref TransitGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGatewayId'
  ResourceShareId:
    Description: ID of the RAM Resource Share
    Value: !Ref ResourceShare
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShareId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for AWS Macie activation, SNS notifications, findings filter, classification job, and cross-account monitoring. Deploy ONLY in us-west-2/eu-west-1/ap-southeast-1/ap-northeast-1/us-east-1.
Parameters:
  MemberAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^[0-9]{12}$|^$'
    Description: 12-digit member account ID (empty for self-account)
  MemberEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Email for member invitation (required for cross-account)
  SNSTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: MacieFindingsTopic
    Description: Base name for SNS topic
  KMSKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional KMS key ARN for SNS encryption
  ScheduleFrequency:
    Type: String
    Default: rate(24 hours)
    Description: Job schedule frequency
Conditions:
  UseKMS: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KMSKeyArn, '']]
  UseCrossAccount: !And
    - !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberAccountId, '']]
    - !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberAccountId, !Ref 'AWS::AccountId']]
  CreateMember: !And
    - Condition: UseCrossAccount
    - !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberEmail, '']]
Resources:
  MacieFindingsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${SNSTopicName}-${AWS::StackName}'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [UseKMS, !Ref KMSKeyArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
  MacieTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowMacie
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: macie.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref MacieFindingsTopic
      Topics:
        - !Ref MacieFindingsTopic
    Tags:
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
      - Key: Purpose
        Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
  MacieSession:
    Type: AWS::Macie2::Session
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MacieSession'
      Status: ENABLED
      FindingPublisherArn: !Ref MacieFindingsTopic
    Tags:
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
      - Key: Purpose
        Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
  SensitiveDataFindingsFilter:
    Type: AWS::Macie2::FindingsFilter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SensitiveDataFilter'
      Description: Filter for HIGH/CRITICAL severity sensitive data findings
      FindingCriteria:
        Criterion:
          severity:
            eq:
              - HIGH
              - CRITICAL
          type:
            contains:
              - SensitiveData:S3Object/Multiple
              - SensitiveData:S3Object/Financial
    Tags:
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
      - Key: Purpose
        Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
      - Key: Purpose
        Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
  AutomatedDiscoveryJob:
    Type: AWS::Macie2::ClassificationJob
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AutomatedDiscoveryJob'
      JobType: SCHEDULED
      JobScheduleFrequency: !Ref ScheduleFrequency
      S3JobDefinition:
        BucketDefinitions:
          - AccountId: !If [UseCrossAccount, !Ref MemberAccountId, !Ref 'AWS::AccountId']
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
  MacieMember:
    Type: AWS

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure and cost-optimized S3 bucket for storing CloudWatch export data with configurable versioning and automated lifecycle management.'

Metadata:
  TemplateOverview: 'Creates a secure S3 bucket optimized for CloudWatch export data storage, featuring configurable versioning, server-side encryption, public access blocks, HTTPS enforcement, CloudWatch service permissions, lifecycle policies for cost optimization, optional Object Lock, and compliance tagging.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: cw-export
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name (must be lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens).'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 30
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9-]+$' 
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: 'Environment tag for cost allocation (e.g., dev, test, prod).'
    AllowedValues: [dev, test, staging, prod]
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    Default: yes
    Description: 'Enable S3 versioning for the bucket.'
    AllowedValues: [yes, no]
  EnableEncryption:
    Type: String
    Default: yes
    Description: 'Enable server-side encryption with SSE-S3 (AES256).'
    AllowedValues: [yes, no]
  EnableObjectLock:
    Type: String
    Default: no
    Description: 'Enable S3 Object Lock in COMPLIANCE mode with 365-day GOVERNANCE retention (requires versioning).'
    AllowedValues: [yes, no]
  TransitionToIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: 'Days after which to transition to STANDARD_IA storage class.'
    MinValue: 0
  TransitionToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    Description: 'Days after which to transition to GLACIER storage class (must be > TransitionToIA).'
    MinValue: 1
  ExpireAfter:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    Description: 'Days after which to expire/delete objects (must be > TransitionToGlacier).'
    MinValue: 1

Conditions:
  VersioningEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, "yes"]
  EncryptionEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableEncryption, "yes"]
  ObjectLockEnabledCond: !Equals [!Ref EnableObjectLock, "yes"]

Resources:
  CloudWatchExportBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration: !If [VersioningEnabled, {Status: Enabled}, {Status: Suspended}]
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption: !If [EncryptionEnabled, {ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration: [{ServerSideEncryptionByDefault: {SSEAlgorithm: AES256}}]}, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      ObjectLockEnabled: !If [ObjectLockEnabledCond, true, false]
      ObjectLockConfiguration: !If [ObjectLockEnabledCond, {ObjectLockEnabled: Enabled, Rule: {DefaultRetention: {Mode: COMPLIANCE, Days: 365}}}, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CloudWatchExportLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpireAfter
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref ExpireAfter
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExportData
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchExports
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn}/*'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket.'
    Value: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket.'
    Value: !GetAtt CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'
  VersioningStatus:
    Description: 'Versioning status of the bucket (Enabled or Suspended).'
    Value: !If [VersioningEnabled, 'Enabled', 'Suspended']
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VersioningStatus'

Description: Deploys GuardDuty Detector for EC2 malicious activity monitoring

Parameters:

    Type: String
    Default: Production
    AllowedValues:
      - Development
      - Staging
      - Production
    Description: Environment for tagging the GuardDuty Detector

    Properties:

      Tags:

          Value: EC2MaliciousActivityMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  DetectorId:
    Description: GuardDuty Detector ID for EC2 monitoring
    Value: !Ref GuardDutyDetector

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Provisions a publicly accessible S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts with public read access and a customer-managed KMS key for encryption, including key alias and granular IAM policies.
Parameters:
  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: lambda-artifacts
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the imported service role
    Default: ''
  KeyDescription:
    Type: String
    Default: KMS key for S3 Lambda artifacts encryption
Conditions:
  ServiceRoleProvided:
    Fn::Not:
      - Fn::Equals:
          - !Ref ServiceRoleArn
          - ''
Resources:
  LambdaArtifactsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: !Ref KeyDescription
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          Fn::If:
            - ServiceRoleProvided
            -
              - Sid: Enable root permissions
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
                Action: 'kms:*'
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: Allow service role usage
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: Deny service role key deletion
                Effect: Deny
                Principal:
                  AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
                Action:
                  - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
                  - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
                Resource: '*'
            -
              - Sid: Enable root permissions
                Effect: Allow
                Principal:
                  AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
                Action: 'kms:*'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaArtifacts
  LambdaArtifactsKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/lambda-artifacts-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKMSKey
  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: false
        BlockPublicPolicy: false
        IgnorePublicAcls: false
        RestrictPublicBuckets: false
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaArtifacts
  LambdaArtifactsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: PublicReadGetObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:GetObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${LambdaArtifactsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:PutInventoryConfiguration: 'true'
Outputs:
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaArtifactsBucket.Arn
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKMSKey
  KMSAliasName:
    Description: Name of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKMSAlias

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Creates an IAM role for AWS Service Catalog to securely provision and manage S3 and Lambda resources, with granular permissions for related services."

Parameters:
  RoleNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    AllowedPattern: "^[a-zA-Z0-9-]*$"
    Description: "Optional suffix for the role name."

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole${RoleNameSuffix}"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "servicecatalog.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess"
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "ServiceCatalogOperationsPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct"
                  - "servicecatalog:UpdateProvisionedProduct"
                  - "servicecatalog:DescribeProductView"
                  - "servicecatalog:SearchProducts"
                  - "servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct"
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: "IAMManagementPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "iam:CreateRole"
                  - "iam:DeleteRole"
                  - "iam:AttachRolePolicy"
                  - "iam:DetachRolePolicy"
                  - "iam:PutRolePolicy"
                  - "iam:UpdateRole"
                  - "iam:PassRole"
                  - "iam:CreatePolicy"
                  - "iam:DeletePolicy"
                  - "iam:CreatePolicyVersion"
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/servicecatalog*"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/servicecatalog*"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/lambda*"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/lambda*"
        - PolicyName: "LambdaLifecyclePolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "lambda:CreateFunction"
                  - "lambda:UpdateFunctionCode"
                  - "lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration"
                  - "lambda:DeleteFunction"
                  - "lambda:ListFunctions"
                  - "lambda:InvokeFunction"
                  - "lambda:AddPermission"
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: "CloudFormationOperationsPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "cloudformation:CreateStack"
                  - "cloudformation:UpdateStack"
                  - "cloudformation:DeleteStack"
                  - "cloudformation:DescribeStacks"
                  - "cloudformation:ListStackResources"
                  - "cloudformation:CreateChangeSet"
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: "SNSIntegrationPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "sns:CreateTopic"
                  - "sns:DeleteTopic"
                  - "sns:Publish"
                  - "sns:Subscribe"
                  - "sns:SetTopicAttributes"
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "ServiceCatalogProvisioning"
        - Key: "ManagedBy"
          Value: "CloudFormation"

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Service Catalog Provisioning Role"
    Value: !GetAtt ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn"
  RoleName:
    Description: "Name of the Service Catalog Provisioning Role"
    Value: !Ref ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Enables AWS Security Hub with default standards and consolidated control findings'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    AllowedValues:
      - Production
      - Staging
      - Development
    Description: Environment for tagging the Security Hub Hub

Resources:
  SecurityHubHub:
    Type: AWS::SecurityHub::Hub
    Properties:
      ControlFindingGenerator: SECURITY_CONTROL
      EnableDefaultStandards: true
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubHub'
        Environment: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  HubArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Security Hub Hub'
    Value: !Ref SecurityHubHub
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HubArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 Image Builder to automate the creation, management, and logging of secure AMIs.

Resources:
  ImageBuilderLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-imagebuilder-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ImageBuilderInstanceRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ImageBuilderS3LogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:CreateTags
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - imagebuilder:GetImage
                  - imagebuilder:ListImages
                  - imagebuilder:GetInfrastructureConfiguration
                  - imagebuilder:ListInfrastructureConfigurations
                Resource: "*"

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: ImageBuilderInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceRole

Outputs:
  LogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for Image Builder logs
    Value: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucket
  ImageBuilderRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for Image Builder EC2 instances
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceRole.Arn
  ImageBuilderInstanceProfileArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM instance profile for Image Builder EC2 instances
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceProfile.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Provisions a secure S3 bucket for VPC flow logs with encryption, versioning, lifecycle rules, and restricted access.'

Parameters:
  UseCustomBucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: no
    AllowedValues:
      - yes
      - no
    Description: 'Set to ''yes'' for custom bucket name (requires CustomBucketName value); defaults to auto-generated unique prefix.'
  CustomBucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: def123
    Description: 'Globally unique custom S3 bucket name (3-63 chars, lowercase alphanum/hyphen/dot; required only if UseCustomBucketName=yes).'
  VersioningConfig:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Default: Enabled
    Description: 'Versioning configuration for the bucket.'
  TransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Number of days after which to transition objects to GLACIER storage class.'
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Number of days after which to permanently delete objects.'

Conditions:
  UseCustomName:
    Fn::Equals:
      - !Ref UseCustomBucketName
      - yes

Resources:
  VPCFlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::If:
          - UseCustomName
          - !Ref CustomBucketName
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      BucketNamePrefix:
        Fn::If:
          - UseCustomName
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
          - !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpcflowlogs-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningConfig
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: FlowLogsLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  VPCFlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogsDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': 'bucket-owner-full-control'
          - Sid: RequireSecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket.'
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket.'
    Value: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketVersioningStatus:
    Description: 'Versioning status of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket.'
    Value: !Ref VersioningConfig
