final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Self-configuring EC2 instance with automated Nginx installation via SSM Association and centralized logging to S3'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '0'
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NginxSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx EC2 instance allowing HTTP/HTTPS inbound and all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxSG'

  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-logs'

  LogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  NginxSSMEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxSSMEC2Role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore'

  S3LoggingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3LoggingPolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/logs/*'
      Roles:
        - !Ref NginxSSMEC2Role

  NginxInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxSSMProfile'
      Roles:
        - !Ref NginxSSMEC2Role

  NginxEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref NginxSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref NginxInstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxEC2Instance'
        - Key: SSMTarget
          Value: NginxInstall

  NginxInstallAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    DependsOn: NginxEC2Instance
    Properties:
      Name: AWS-RunShellScript
      AssociationName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxInstallAssociation'
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - yum update -y
          - yum install -y nginx
          - systemctl start nginx
          - systemctl enable nginx
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:SSMTarget
          Values:
            - NginxInstall
      OutputLocation:
        S3Location:
          OutputS3BucketName: !Ref LogBucket
          OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/
      MaxConcurrency: '1'
      MaxErrors: '0'

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the Nginx EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref NginxEC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceId'

  EC2PublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the Nginx EC2 instance for web access
    Value: !GetAtt NginxEC2Instance.PublicDnsName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2PublicDnsName'

  LogBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for SSM logs
    Value: !Ref LogBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogBucketName'

  SSMAssociationId:
    Description: ID of the SSM Association for Nginx installation
    Value: !Ref NginxInstallAssociation
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMAssociationId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to deploy an EC2 instance with automated OS updates, Nginx installation, and validation using SSM Automation, including centralized S3 logging.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0a313d6098716f372
    us-west-2:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    eu-west-1:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0d3a7bc97debfd9b6
    us-west-1:
      AmazonLinux2: ami-0d1fcd6e706b3fa4d

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EC2SG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance allowing SSH and HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SG'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-logs'

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonCloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
      Path: '/'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole'

  EC2SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  AutomationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AutomationRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AutomationExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:CancelCommand
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:ListCommandInvocations
                  - ssm:GetDocument
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:managed-instance/*'
                  - 'arn:aws:ssm:*:*:document/AWS-*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:StartAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:GetAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:StopAutomationExecution
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
      Path: '/'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AutomationRole'

  NginxAutomationDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxAutomationDocument'
      DocumentType: Automation
      DocumentFormat: YAML
      Content: |
        description: Orchestrate OS updates, Nginx installation, and validation on EC2 instance
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        parameters:
          InstanceIdList:
            type: StringList
            description: List of managed instance IDs
          assumeRole:
            type: String
            description: (Optional) The ARN of the role that allows Automation to perform the actions
            default: ''
        mainSteps:
        - name: assumeRole
          action: 'aws:assumeRole'
          inputs:
            RoleArn: '{{ assumeRole }}'
            RoleType: TargetInstanceAndAutomation
          nextStep: updateOS
        - name: updateOS
          action: 'aws:runCommand'
          inputs:
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - sudo yum update -y
            InstanceIds: '{{ InstanceIdList }}'
          nextStep: checkReboot
        - name: checkReboot
          action: 'aws:runCommand'
          inputs:
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - sudo yum install -y yum-utils
              - sudo needs-restarting -r
            InstanceIds:
            - '{{ InstanceIdList.[0] }}'
          nextStep: decideReboot
        - name: decideReboot
          action: 'aws:branch'
          inputs:
            Choices:
            - Variable: '{{ checkReboot.commandPlugin.standardOutputContent[0] }}'
              Operator: string|lengthGreaterThan
              Value: '0'
              NextStep: rebootIfNeeded
            Default: installNginx
        - name: rebootIfNeeded
          action: 'aws:reboot'
          inputs:
            InstanceIds: '{{ InstanceIdList }}'
          nextStep: waitForOnline
        - name: waitForOnline
          action: 'aws:waitForAwsResourceProperty'
          inputs:
            Service: EC2
            Api: DescribeInstances
            PropertySelector: $.Reservations[0].Instances[?InstanceId=='{{ InstanceIdList.[0] }}'][0].State.Name
            DesiredValues: [running]
            MaxAttempts: 60
        - name: installNginx
          action: 'aws:runCommand'
          inputs:
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - sudo yum install -y nginx
              - sudo systemctl enable nginx
              - sudo systemctl start nginx
            InstanceIds: '{{ InstanceIdList }}'
          nextStep: validateNginx
        - name: validateNginx
          action: 'aws:runCommand'
          inputs:
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - curl -f http://localhost
            InstanceIds: '{{ InstanceIdList }}'
          nextStep: reportSuccess
        - name: reportSuccess
          action: 'aws:runCommand'
          inputs:
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - echo "Nginx setup and validation completed successfully."
            InstanceIds:
            - '{{ InstanceIdList.[0] }}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxAutomation'

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AmazonLinux2]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SG
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Monitoring: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum install -y amazon-cloudwatch-agent
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable amazon-cloudwatch-agent
          /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl -a fetch-config -m ec2 -s -c ssm:AmazonCloudWatch-Linux
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyNginxInstance
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  NginxSetupAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    DependsOn: MyEC2Instance
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref NginxAutomationDocument
      AssociationName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxAssociation'
      AutomationTargetParameterName: InstanceIdList
      Parameters:
        assumeRole:
          - !GetAtt AutomationExecutionRole.Arn
      Targets:
        - Key: InstanceIds
          Values:
            - !Ref MyEC2Instance
      OutputLocation:
        S3Location:
          OutputS3BucketName: !Ref S3Bucket
          OutputS3KeyPrefix: ssm-logs/

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceId'

  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicIp'

  DocumentName:
    Description: SSM Automation Document Name
    Value: !Ref NginxAutomationDocument
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DocumentName'

  AssociationId:
    Description: SSM Association ID
    Value: !Ref NginxSetupAssociation
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AssociationId'

  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for SSM logs
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'
deploy_logs: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Tag-driven Nginx deployment via SSM Automation.'

Parameters:
  LatestAmazonLinux2AMI:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref 'InternetGateway'

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - '0'
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref 'PublicRouteTable'
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref 'InternetGateway'

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref 'PublicSubnet'
      RouteTableId: !Ref 'PublicRouteTable'

  NginxSG:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Allow SSH and HTTP inbound traffic'
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: 'tcp'
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
        - IpProtocol: 'tcp'
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: '-1'
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxSG'

  SSMRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 'ec2.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Action:
                  - 'ssm:SendCommand'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Action:
                  - 'ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus'
                Resource: '*'

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref 'SSMRole'

  NginxInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref 'LatestAmazonLinux2AMI'
      InstanceType: 't3.micro'
      SubnetId: !Ref 'PublicSubnet'
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref 'NginxSG'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref 'SSMInstanceProfile'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxInstance'
        - Key: 'nginx'
          Value: 'Yes'

  NginxAutomationDocument:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Document'
    Properties:
      DocumentType: 'Automation'
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        description: 'Deploys and validates Nginx on tagged instances via SSM Automation.'
        mainSteps:
          - name: 'UpdateOS'
            action: 'aws:runCommand'
            maxAttempts: 1
            onFailure: 'Abort'
            timeoutSeconds: 600
            inputs:
              DocumentName: 'AWS-RunShellScript'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - 'yum update -y'
                  - |
                    INSTALLED_KERNELS=$(rpm -q kernel --qf "%{VERSION}-%{RELEASE}\n" | sort -V)
                    LATEST_KERNEL=$(echo "$INSTALLED_KERNELS" | tail -1)
                    RUNNING_KERNEL=$(uname -r)
                    if [[ "$LATEST_KERNEL" != "$RUNNING_KERNEL" ]]; then
                      echo "New kernel detected ($LATEST_KERNEL vs $RUNNING_KERNEL). Rebooting."
                      reboot
                    else
                      echo "No kernel update required."
                    fi
          - name: 'RebootCheck'
            action: 'aws:runCommand'
            maxAttempts: 1
            onFailure: 'Abort'
            timeoutSeconds: 600
            inputs:
              DocumentName: 'AWS-RunShellScript'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - |
                    INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
                    STATUS=$(aws ec2 describe-instance-status --instance-ids $INSTANCE_ID --query 'InstanceStatuses[0].InstanceStatus.Status' --output text 2>/dev/null || echo "impaired")
                    if [[ "$STATUS" != "ok" ]]; then
                      echo "Instance status is $STATUS, expected ok. Aborting."
                      exit 1
                    fi
                    echo "Instance status is ok."
          - name: 'InstallNginx'
            action: 'aws:runCommand'
            maxAttempts: 1
            onFailure: 'Abort'
            timeoutSeconds: 600
            inputs:
              DocumentName: 'AWS-RunShellScript'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - 'yum install -y nginx'
                  - 'systemctl enable nginx'
                  - 'systemctl start nginx'
          - name: 'ValidateNginx'
            action: 'aws:runCommand'
            maxAttempts: 1
            onFailure: 'Abort'
            timeoutSeconds: 600
            inputs:
              DocumentName: 'AWS-RunShellScript'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - 'curl -f http://localhost || exit 1'
                  - 'systemctl is-active --quiet nginx || exit 1'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID'
    Value: !Ref 'NginxInstance'

  PublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP of the Nginx Instance'
    Value: !GetAtt 'NginxInstance.PublicIp'

  SSMDocARN:
    Description: 'ARN of the SSM Automation Document'
    Value: !Ref 'NginxAutomationDocument'

  ExecutionInstructions:
    Description: 'CLI command to execute the automation on tagged instances'
    Value: !Sub |
      aws ssm start-automation-execution \\
        --document-name ${NginxAutomationDocument} \\
        --target-locations Key=tag:nginx,Values=Yes

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Production-ready VPC network infrastructure with public/private subnets, NAT, internal ALB, security groups, ECR repository, and SSM parameters.

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
  AppName:
    Type: String
    Default: myapp
  AllowedSSH:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-VPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-IGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::GetAZs: ''
      CidrBlock:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::Cidr:
              - !Ref VpcCidr
              - 1
              - 24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-PublicSubnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 1
          - Fn::GetAZs: ''
      CidrBlock:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::Cidr:
              - !Ref VpcCidr
              - 2
              - 24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-PrivateSubnet1"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 2
          - Fn::GetAZs: ''
      CidrBlock:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::Cidr:
              - !Ref VpcCidr
              - 3
              - 24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-PrivateSubnet2"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-EIP"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-NAT"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-PublicRT"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-PrivateRT"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub "Security group for ${Environment}-${AppName} ALB"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-ALBSG"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub "Security group for ${Environment}-${AppName} app"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSSH
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-AppSG"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-ALB"
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Scheme: internal
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: crossZoneLoadBalancing.enabled
          Value: enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-ALB"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-TG"
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckPath: /health
      HealthyThresholdCount: 2
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-TG"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: AppName
          Value: !Ref AppName

  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            StatusCode: '503'
            ContentType: 'text/plain'
            MessageBody: 'Service not available'

  ECRRepo:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub "${Environment}-${AppName}-ecr-repo-${AWS::Region}"
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      ImageTagMutability: MUTABLE
      RepositoryPolicyText: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2008-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "AllowPushPull",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "${AWS::AccountId}"
              },
              "Action": [
                "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer",
                "ecr:BatchGetImage",
                "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability",
                "ecr:PutImage",
                "ecr:InitiateLayerUpload",
                "ecr:UploadLayerPart",

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Serverless AWS Organizations data pipeline for governance and reporting'

Parameters:
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: org-governance-data
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name'
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '000000000000'
    AllowedPattern: '^[0-9]{12}$'
    MinLength: 12
    MaxLength: 12
    Description: '12-digit AWS account ID of the Organizations management account'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: managementcur
    Description: 'Athena/Glue database name for cataloged data'
  CrossAccountRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: OrganizationsReaderRole
    Description: 'IAM role name in management account for cross-account Organizations read access'
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of tag keys to include in reports'
  ScheduleExpression:
    Type: String
    Default: 'cron(0 0 ? * SUN *)'
    Description: 'CloudWatch Events/EventBridge schedule expression (weekly by default)'

Resources:
  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${S3BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: 'NoncurrentVersionsToIA'
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 90
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchLogsFullAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'OrganizationsDataAccess'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - organizations:ListAccounts
                  - organizations:ListOrganizationalUnitsForParent
                  - organizations:ListParents
                  - organizations:ListRoots
                  - organizations:ListTagsForResource
                  - organizations:DescribeAccount
                  - organizations:DescribeOrganizationalUnit
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/${CrossAccountRoleName}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'S3AndGlueAccess'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - glue:GetDatabase
                  - glue:GetTable
                  - glue:CreateTable
                  - glue:UpdateTable
                  - glue:DeleteTable
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  OrganizationsDataCollector:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub 'OrganizationsDataCollector-${AWS::StackName}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      Environment:
        Variables:
          S3Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
          ManagementAccountId: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          CrossAccountRoleName: !Ref CrossAccountRoleName
          TagsToInclude: !Ref TagsToInclude
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          import datetime
          from botocore.exceptions import ClientError

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              bucket = os.environ['S3Bucket']
              mgmt_account_id = os.environ['ManagementAccountId']
              cross_account_role = os.environ.get('CrossAccountRoleName', 'OrganizationsReaderRole')
              tags_to_include = [t.strip() for t in os.environ.get('TagsToInclude', '').split(',') if t.strip()]

              sts = boto3.client('sts')
              role_arn = f"arn:aws:iam::{mgmt_account_id}:role/{cross_account_role}"
              assumed = sts.assume_role(RoleArn=role_arn, RoleSessionName='OrgDataCollectorSession')
              org_client = boto3.client('organizations',
                  aws_access_key_id=assumed['Credentials']['AccessKeyId'],
                  aws_secret_access_key=assumed['Credentials']['SecretAccessKey'],
                  aws_session_token=assumed['Credentials']['SessionToken'])
              s3_client = boto3.client('s3')

              # Accounts
              accounts = []
              paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_accounts')
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  accounts.extend(page['Accounts'])

              # Account tags
              account_tags = {}
              for acc in accounts:
                  try:
                      resp = org_client.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=acc['Id'], ResourceType='ACCOUNT')
                      account_tags[acc['Id']] = resp['Tags']
                  except ClientError:
                      pass

              # Simple hierarchy (roots and direct OUs)
              hierarchy = {'Roots': []}
              root_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_roots')
              for root_page in root_paginator.paginate():
                  for root in root_page['Roots']:
                      root_info = {'Id': root['Id'], 'Name': root['Name']}
                      try:
                          root_resp = org_client.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=root['Id'], ResourceType='ROOT')
                          root_info['Tags'] = root_resp['Tags']
                      except ClientError:
                          pass
                      # OUs under root
                      ous = []
                      ou_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_organizational_units_for_parent')
                      for ou_page in ou_paginator.paginate(ParentId=root['Id']):
                          for ou in ou_page['OrganizationalUnits']:
                              ou_info = {'Id': ou['Id'], 'Name': ou['Name']}
                              try:
                                  ou_resp = org_client.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=ou['Id'], ResourceType='ORGANIZATIONAL_UNIT')
                                  ou_info['Tags'] = ou_resp['Tags']
                              except ClientError:
                                  pass
                              ous.append(ou_info)
                      root_info['OrganizationalUnits'] = ous
                      hierarchy['Roots'].append(root_info)

              data = {
                  'timestamp': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
                  'accounts': accounts,
                  'account_tags': account_tags,
                  'hierarchy': hierarchy
              }
              if tags_to_include:
                  data['account_tags'] = {k: [t for t in v if t['Key'] in tags_to_include] for k, v in account_tags.items()}

              dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
              prefix = dt.strftime('org-data/%Y/%m/%d/')
              key = f'{prefix}org-data.json'
              s3_client.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key, Body=json.dumps(data, default=str), ServerSideEncryption='AES256', ContentType='application/json')
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Data collected successfully')}
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  WeeklyOrgDataRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: 'Weekly trigger for Organizations data collection'
      ScheduleExpression: !Ref ScheduleExpression
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt OrganizationsDataCollector.Arn
          Id: 'OrgDataCollectorTarget'

  EventInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref OrganizationsDataCollector
      Action: 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt WeeklyOrgDataRule.Arn

  ManagementCURDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: 'Catalog for AWS Organizations governance data'

  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub 'OrgDataCrawler-${AWS::StackName}'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
      Description: 'Crawls S3 Organizations data into Glue/Athena catalog'
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${OrgDataBucket}/org-data'
            Exclusions:
              - '**/temp/**'
              - '**/*.tmp'
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: 'cron(0 1 ? * SUN *)'
      Tags:
        Project: OrgGovernancePipeline
        StackName: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
    DependsOn:
      - ManagementCURDatabase

  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'DenyUnsecuredTransport'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: 'EnforceServerSideEncryption'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'AES256'
          - Sid: 'AllowLambdaAccess'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}/*'
          - Sid: 'AllowGlueAccess'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OrgDataBucket}/*'

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket storing Organizations data'
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketArn'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function collecting Organizations data'
    Value: !GetAtt OrganizationsDataCollector.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn'
  GlueCrawlerName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue crawler for cataloging data'
    Value: !Ref OrgDataCrawler
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueCrawlerName'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Description: 'Name of the Athena/Glue database'
    Value: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AthenaDatabaseName'
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule scheduling data collection'
    Value: !GetAtt WeeklyOrgDataRule.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRuleArn'

Description: Deploys an AWS Amplify web app with production branch for TodoApp hosting

Parameters:
  AppName:
    Type: String
    Default: TodoApp
  BranchName:
    Type: String
    Default: production

Resources:
  AmplifyApp:
    Type: 'AWS::Amplify::App'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AppName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      Platform: WEB
      AutoBranchCreationConfig:
        EnableAutoBranchCreation: false
      CustomRules:
        - Source: '/<*>'
          Target: '/index.html'
          Status: '404-200'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AppName

  AmplifyBranch:
    Type: 'AWS::Amplify::Branch'
    Properties:
      AppId: !GetAtt AmplifyApp.AppId
      BranchName: !Ref BranchName
      Stage: PRODUCTION
      EnableAutoBuild: true
      Framework: React

Outputs:
  AppId:
    Description: Amplify App ID
    Value: !Ref AmplifyApp
  BranchDefaultDomain:
    Description: Default domain for the production branch
    Value: !GetAtt AmplifyApp.DefaultDomain
  BranchUrl:
    Description: URL for the production branch
    Value: !Sub 'https://${BranchName}.${AmplifyApp.DefaultDomain}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure multi-AZ VPC architecture with public/private subnets and NAT Gateway connectivity following AWS Well-Architected security best practices.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  EIPA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EIPA"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  EIPB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EIPB"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  NATGatewayA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPA.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayA"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  NATGatewayB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPB.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayB"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  RouteTableAssociationPublicA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  RouteTableAssociationPublicB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTableA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableA"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PrivateRouteA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayA

  RouteTableAssociationPrivateA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA

  PrivateRouteTableB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableB"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure
        - Key: Owner
          Value: CloudTeam

  PrivateRouteB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayB

  RouteTableAssociationPrivateB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPCId"

  PublicSubnetAId:
    Description: Public Subnet A ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetAId"

  PublicSubnetBId:
    Description: Public Subnet B ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetBId"

  PrivateSubnetAId:
    Description: Private Subnet A ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetAId"

  PrivateSubnetBId:
    Description: Private Subnet B ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetBId"

  NATGatewayAId:
    Description: NAT Gateway A ID
    Value: !Ref NATGatewayA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayAId"

  NATGatewayBId:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Standardized IAM Baseline for Secure Governance

Parameters:
  IdentityManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: Account ID for Identity Management Account (e.g., 111111111111)
    Default: '111111111111'
  ToolingManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: Account ID for Tooling Management Account (e.g., 222222222222)
    Default: '222222222222'

Resources:
  SharedDenyPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: SharedDenyPolicy
      Description: Explicit denies for sensitive operations
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:GetAccountAuthorizationDetails'
              - 'billing:*'
              - 'cloudhsm:*'
              - 'support:*'
            Resource: '*'

  PrivilegedMFAPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: PrivilegedMFAPolicy
      Description: MFA requirement for IAM actions
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action: 'iam:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'false'

  PrivilegedSpecificDenyPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: PrivilegedSpecificDenyPolicy
      Description: Specific denies for privileged role
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:DeleteRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy'
            Resource: '*'

  RestrictedMFAPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: RestrictedMFAPolicy
      Description: MFA requirement for elevated actions
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'ec2:RunInstances'
              - 'rds:CreateDBInstance'
              - 'iam:CreateRole'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'false'

  RestrictedDenyPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: RestrictedDenyPolicy
      Description: Additional denies for restricted role
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
            Resource: '*'

  IdentityMFAPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: IdentityMFAPolicy
      Description: MFA requirement for sensitive IAM actions
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
              - 'iam:DeleteUser'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'false'

  IdentityPassRoleDenyPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: IdentityPassRoleDenyPolicy
      Description: Deny PassRole on admin roles
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action: 'iam:PassRole'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/PrivilegedAdminRole'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/AWSCloudFormationStackSetsAdministrationRole'

  PrivilegedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: PrivilegedAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${IdentityManagementAccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ToolingManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
        - !Ref PrivilegedMFAPolicy
        - !Ref PrivilegedSpecificDenyPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Baseline

  RestrictedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: RestrictedAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${IdentityManagementAccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ToolingManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/PowerUserAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
        - !Ref RestrictedMFAPolicy
        - !Ref RestrictedDenyPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Baseline

  IdentityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: IdentityAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${IdentityManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMFullAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
        - !Ref IdentityMFAPolicy
        - !Ref IdentityPassRoleDenyPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Baseline

  CloudFormationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CloudFormationExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSCloudFormationFullAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StackManagementPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DeleteStack'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Baseline

  StackSetExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: AWSCloudFormationStackSetsExecutionRole
      Path: '/stacksets/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StackSetsExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStackInstances'
                  - 'cloudformation:DeleteStackInstances'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackInstance'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackSet'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackSetOperation'
                  - 'cloudformation:ListStackInstances'
                  - 'cloudformation:ListStackSetOperations'
                  - 'cloudformation:ListStackSets'
                  - 'cloudformation:ListStackSetOperationResults'
                  - 'cloudformation:StopStackSetOperation'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStackInstances'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStackSet'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:*:${AWS::AccountId}:stackset/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject*'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Baseline

  StackSetAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: AWSCloudFormationStackSetsAdministrationRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ToolingManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StackSetsAdminRestrictPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: 'cloudformation:*'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringNotLike:
                    'cloudformation:Resources': 'arn:aws:cloudformation:*:*:stackset/*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStackInstances'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStackInstances'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  BoolIfExists:
                    'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'false'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Baseline

  PrivilegedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: PrivilegedAdminGroup
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
        - !Ref PrivilegedMFAPolicy
        - !Ref PrivilegedSpecificDenyPolicy

  RestrictedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: RestrictedAdminGroup
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/PowerUserAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
        - !Ref RestrictedMFAPolicy
        - !Ref RestrictedDenyPolicy

  IdentityAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: IdentityAdminGroup
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMFullAccess'
        - !Ref SharedDenyPolicy
        - !Ref IdentityMFAPolicy
        - !Ref IdentityPassRoleDenyPolicy

Outputs:
  PrivilegedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the PrivilegedAdminRole
    Value: !GetAtt PrivilegedAdminRole.Arn
  RestrictedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the RestrictedAdminRole
    Value: !GetAtt RestrictedAdminRole.Arn
  IdentityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IdentityAdminRole
    Value: !GetAtt IdentityAdminRole.Arn
  CloudFormationExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudFormation Execution Role
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFormationExecutionRole.Arn
  StackSetExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the StackSet Execution Role
    Value: !GetAtt StackSetExecutionRole.Arn
  StackSetAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the StackSet Admin Role
    Value: !GetAtt StackSetAdminRole.Arn
  PrivilegedAdminGroupName:
    Description: Name of the PrivilegedAdminGroup
    Value: !Ref PrivilegedAdminGroup
  RestrictedAdminGroupName:
    Description: Name of the RestrictedAdminGroup
    Value: !Ref RestrictedAdminGroup
  IdentityAdminGroupName:
    Description: Name of the IdentityAdminGroup
    Value: !Ref IdentityAdminGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with Flow Logs configured to deliver to a secure S3 bucket with comprehensive metadata, SSL enforcement, public access blocked, and minimal IAM permissions.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: vpc-flow-logs
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  LogFilePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional prefix for log files in the S3 bucket (e.g., logs/)
  TrafficType:
    Type: String
    Default: ALL
    AllowedValues:
      - ALL
      - ACCEPT
      - REJECT
    Description: Traffic type to log
  MaxAggregationInterval:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    AllowedValues:
      - 60
      - 600
    Description: Max aggregation interval in seconds
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    Description: Environment tag
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Default: CloudTeam
    Description: Owner tag

Resources:
  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      ObjectLockEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      ObjectLockConfiguration:
        ObjectLockEnabled: Enabled
        Rule:
          DefaultRetention:
            Days: 3650
            Mode: COMPLIANCE
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs-Monitoring

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub
                - '${BucketArn}/*'
                - BucketArn: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
            Condition:
              "Bool":
                "aws:SecureTransport": false
          - Sid: DenyIncorrectAccountOrOrg
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub
                - '${BucketArn}/*'
                - BucketArn: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
            Condition:
              "StringNotEquals":
                "aws:PrincipalAccount": !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: DenyNoOrg
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub
                - '${BucketArn}/*'
                - BucketArn: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
            Condition:
              "Null":
                "aws:PrincipalOrgID": "true"

  VPCFlowLogsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCFlowLogsRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: vpc-flow-logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
                'aws:ExternalId': 'flowlogs'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FlowLogsS3Policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetBucketAcl
                  - s3:PutBucketAcl
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/${Prefix}*'
                    - Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
                      Prefix: !Ref LogFilePrefix
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs-Monitoring

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs-Monitoring

  VPCFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      ResourceType: VPC
      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficType
      MaxAggregationInterval: !Ref MaxAggregationInterval
      LogDestinationType: s3
      LogDestination: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/${LogFilePrefix}'
      LogFormat: '${version} ${account-id} ${interface-id} ${srcaddr} ${dstaddr} ${srcport} ${dstport} ${protocol} ${packets} ${bytes} ${start} ${end} ${action} ${log-status} ${vpc-id} ${subnet-id} ${instance-id} ${tcp-flags} ${type} ${pkt-srcaddr} ${pkt-dstaddr}'
      DeliverLogsPermissionArn: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs-Monitoring

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC with Flow Logs enabled
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template that creates a risk management system for AWS workloads. It provisions
  a DynamoDB table with composite keys, IAM role for Lambda functions, two Lambda functions for
  risk data ingestion and processing, and an SNS topic with policy for SSM OpsCenter notifications,
  integrating logging, data storage, and notifications to track and respond to operational risks.
Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    Description: Environment for tagging resources
  TableNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional prefix for table and topic names
Resources:
  RiskManagementTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${TableNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-RiskTable"
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

    Properties:

      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRiskManagementRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RiskManagementPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                  - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
                  - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
                Resource: !GetAtt RiskManagementTable.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
  RiskDataIngestionFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RiskDataIngestionFunction"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.ingestion_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          import boto3
          from boto3.dynamodb.conditions import Key

          def ingestion_handler(event, context):
              table_name = os.environ['TABLE_NAME']
              topic_arn = os.environ['SNS_TOPIC_ARN']
              dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
              table = dynamodb.Table(table_name)
              table.put_item(Item={
                  'workload_id': 'test-ingestion',
                  'question_id': '1',
                  'risk_data': 'ingested'
              })
              sns_client = boto3.client('sns')
              sns_client.publish(TopicArn=topic_arn, Message='Ingestion successful')
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Ingestion done')}

          def processor_handler(event, context):
              table_name = os.environ['TABLE_NAME']
              topic_arn = os.environ['SNS_TOPIC_ARN']
              dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
              table = dynamodb.Table(table_name)
              response = table.query(KeyConditionExpression=Key('workload_id').eq('test-ingestion'))
              items = response.get('Items', [])
              sns_client = boto3.client('sns')
              sns_client.publish(TopicArn=topic_arn, Message=f'Processed {len(items)} items')
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps({'count': len(items)})}

      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref RiskManagementTable

      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
