AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation, including VPC, five managed t3.nano instances tagged for dev environment, and an admin t3.micro instance preconfigured with AWS Instance Scheduler CLI via UserData.'

Resources:
  LabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LabVPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: dev

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: dev

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: dev

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: dev

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket with event-driven notifications to an SNS topic for s3:ObjectCreated:* events. Includes server-side encryption, public access blocks, SNS topic policy restricted to this bucket, and bucket policy for uploads.'

Parameters:
  BucketPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9-]*$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed.'
    Description: 'Optional prefix for the S3 bucket name to aid in organization.'

Resources:
  ObjectCreatedTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ObjectCreatedTopic'
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ObjectCreated-Alerts'

  ObjectCreatedTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow-S3-Publish'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sns:Publish'
            Resource: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                sourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketPrefix}${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-s3-notifications-bucket'
      Topics:
        - !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic

  NotificationBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketPrefix}${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-s3-notifications-bucket'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256

  BucketUploadPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref NotificationBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${NotificationBucket}/*'

  NotificationConfigRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3NotificationConfig'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetBucketNotification
                  - s3:PutBucketNotification
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketPrefix}${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-s3-notifications-bucket'

  S3NotificationConfigurer:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3NotificationConfigurer'
      Role: !GetAtt NotificationConfigRole.Arn
      Handler: index.handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib3
          import boto3

          http = urllib3.PoolManager()

          def send(event, context, success, data, physical_resource_id, reason=None):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_body = {
                  'Status': success,
                  'Reason': reason or f'See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream: {context.log_stream_name}',
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id or context.log_stream_name,
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': data
              }
              json_response_body = json.dumps(response_body)
              headers = {
                  'content-type': '',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_response_body))
              }
              print('Response body:\n' + json_response_body)
              response = http.request(
                  'PUT',
                  response_url,
                  body=json_response_body,
                  headers=headers
              )
              print(f'Status code: {response.status}')

          def handler(event, context):
              try:
                  props = event['ResourceProperties']
                  bucket_name = props['BucketName']
                  topic_arn = props['TopicArn']
                  events = props['Events']
                  s3 = boto3.client('s3')
                  if event['RequestType'] == 'Delete':
                      config = {
                          'TopicConfigurations': []
                      }
                      s3.put_bucket_notification_configuration(
                          Bucket=bucket_name,
                          NotificationConfiguration=config
                      )
                      send(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {}, bucket_name)
                      return
                  config = {
                      'TopicConfigurations': [
                          {
                              'Id': 'ObjectCreatedTopicConfig',
                              'TopicArn': topic_arn,
                              'Events': events
                          }
                      ]
                  }
                  s3.put_bucket_notification_configuration(
                      Bucket=bucket_name,
                      NotificationConfiguration=config
                  )
                  send(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {'BucketName': bucket_name}, bucket_name)
              except Exception as e:
                  send(event, context, 'FAILED', {}, None, str(e))

  BucketNotificationConfig:
    Type: 'Custom::S3BucketNotification'
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt S3NotificationConfigurer.Arn
      BucketName: !Ref NotificationBucket
      TopicArn: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
      Events:
        - 's3:ObjectCreated:*'
    DependsOn:
      - ObjectCreatedTopicPolicy

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 notification bucket'
    Value: !Ref NotificationBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic for ObjectCreated events'
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
    Export:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'REST API Gateway integrated with SQS for HTTP-based message retrieval'

Resources:
  MessageRetrievalQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MessageRetrievalQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600

  MessageRetrievalQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MessageRetrievalQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${MessageRetrievalApi}/*'

  ApiGatewaySqsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ApiGatewaySqsRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SqsReceiveMessagePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn

  MessageRetrievalApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MessageRetrievalApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - '*~1*'

  MessagesResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages

  GetMessagesMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi

            application/json: Empty
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsRole.Arn
        ContentHandling: CONVERT_TO_TEXT
        RequestTemplates:
          application/x-www-form-urlencoded: 'Action=ReceiveMessage&$input.params().querystring'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$.ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult'))
                #set($messages = [] )
                #if($inputRoot.Messages)
                  #set($messages = $inputRoot.Messages)
                #elseif($inputRoot.Message)
                  #set($messages = [$inputRoot.Message])
                #end
                {
                  "Messages": [
                    #foreach($message in $messages)
                    {
                      "MessageId": "$message.MessageId",
                      "ReceiptHandle": "$message.ReceiptHandle",
                      "Body": "$util.escapeJavaScript($message.Body)",
                      "MD5OfBody": "$message.MD5OfBody"
                    }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                    #end
                  ]
                }

            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode":200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"

      - GetMessagesMethod
      - OptionsMessagesMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      Description: !Sub 'Deployment for ${AWS::StackName}'

  ProdStage:

    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod

          LoggingLevel: INFO
          MetricsEnabled: true
          ThrottlingBurstLimit: 500
          ThrottlingRateLimit: 1000

  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'SQS Queue URL'
    Value: !Ref MessageRetrievalQueue

  QueueArn:
    Description: 'SQS Queue ARN'
    Value: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure AWS Cognito User Pool for admin-managed user provisioning with hosted UI, OAuth flows, and strong security policies.'

Parameters:
  PoolName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecureUserPool
    Description: Name for the Cognito User Pool
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: testprefix
    Description: Prefix for the Cognito hosted UI domain (must be globally unique)
  CallbackURL:
    Type: String
    Default: http://localhost:3000/callback
    Description: Callback URL for OAuth authorization code flow
  LogoutURL:
    Type: String
    Default: http://localhost:3000/logout
    Description: Logout URL for the hosted UI

Resources:
  SecureUserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Ref PoolName
      UsernameConfiguration:
        CaseSensitive: false
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      EmailVerificationSubject: Verify your email
      EmailVerificationMessage: Your verification code is {####}
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
          TemporaryPasswordValidityDays: 7
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
        InviteMessageTemplate:
          SMSMessage: Your username is {username} and temporary password is {####}.
          EmailMessage: |
            Hello {username},
            Your temporary password is {####}.
            Please use it to log in and verify your email address.
          EmailSubject: Welcome - Your account has been created
      UserPoolTags:
        Environment: Production
        Purpose: SecureUserManagement

  UserPoolDomain:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolDomain
    Properties:
      Domain: !Sub "${DomainPrefix}-auth"
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureUserPool

  AppClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureUserPool
      ClientName: AppClient
      GenerateSecret: true
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - email
        - openid
        - phone
        - profile
      CallbackURLs:
        - !Ref CallbackURL
      LogoutURLs:
        - !Ref LogoutURL
      ReadAttributes:
        - email
        - phone_number
      WriteAttributes:
        - email
        - phone_number
      TokenValidityUnits:
        AccessToken: seconds
        IdToken: seconds
        RefreshToken: days
      AccessTokenValidity: 3600
      IdTokenValidity: 3600
      RefreshTokenValidity: 86400

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ID
    Value: !Ref SecureUserPool
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolId"
  UserPoolClientId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool Client ID
    Value: !Ref AppClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolClientId"
  UserPoolDomain:
    Description: Cognito User Pool Domain
    Value: !Ref UserPoolDomain
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolDomain"
  HostedUIRegionEndpoint:
    Description: Hosted UI Endpoint
    Value: !Sub "https://${UserPoolDomain}.auth.${AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-HostedUIRegionEndpoint"
  UserPoolEndpoint:
    Description: Cognito User Pool Endpoint (Issuer/JWKS)
    Value: !Sub "https://cognito-idp.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${SecureUserPool}"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolEndpoint"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "EventBridge to MongoDB API integration with API key auth, DLQ, and IAM role."

Parameters:
  MongoDBUrl:
    Type: String
    Default: 'https://www.testanu.com'
    Description: MongoDB API endpoint URL
  ApiKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'test_name'
  ApiKeyValue:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: 'test_value'
  EventBusName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'MongoDBEventBus'

Resources:
  EventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${EventBusName}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MongoDLQ'
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn

  EventBridgeApiRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EventBridgeApiRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EventBridgeApiPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:events/api-destinations/*'

  MongoDBConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: !Ref ApiKeyName
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKeyValue

  MongoDBApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MongoDBApiDestination'
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: !Ref MongoDBUrl
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  RouteToMongoDBRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref EventBus
      RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeApiRole.Arn
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - custom.mongodb.app
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: MongoTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
          HttpParameters:
            HeaderParameters:
              Content-Type: application/json

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: "Custom EventBus ARN for sending events"
    Value: !GetAtt EventBus.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: "API Destination for MongoDB"
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
  DLQUrl:
    Description: "SQS DLQ URL for failed events"
    Value: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
  RoleArn:
    Description: "IAM Role for EventBridge invocations"
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeApiRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Cross-account private API Gateway with Lambda backend and custom domain restricted to VPC endpoint'

Parameters:
  VpcEndpointId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'VPC Endpoint ID for private access, cross-account'
    Default: 'vpce-0123456789abcdef0'
  CustomDomainName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'e.g., api.example.private'
    Default: 'api.example.private'
  AcmCertificateArn:
    Type: String
    Description: 'ARN of ACM certificate for custom domain'
    Default: 'arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012'
  ApiStageName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'prod'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'LambdaExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'LambdaBasicLogging'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/*'

  ApiLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: 'ApiLambdaFunction'
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async () => ({ statusCode: 200, body: JSON.stringify({ message: 'Hello from private Lambda via API Gateway' }) });
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      RuntimeManagementConfig:
        UpdateRuntimeOn: Auto

  ApiGatewayInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref ApiLambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*'

  PrivateApiGateway:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: 'PrivateApi'
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
        VpcEndpointIds:
          - !Ref VpcEndpointId

  ProxyResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      ParentId: !GetAtt PrivateApiGateway.RootResourceId
      PathPart: 'api'

  ProxyMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      ResourceId: !Ref ProxyResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${ApiLambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      Description: 'Initial deployment for private API'
    DependsOn: ProxyMethod

  ApiStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      StageName: !Ref ApiStageName
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment

  CustomDomain:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::DomainName
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      RegionalCertificateArn: !Ref AcmCertificateArn
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  ApiBasePathMapping:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::BasePathMapping
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomain
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      Stage: !Ref ApiStageName
      BasePath: ''

Outputs:
  PrivateApiId:
    Value: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
  ApiInvokeUrl:
    Value: !Sub '${CustomDomainName}/${ApiStageName}/api'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ApiLambdaFunction.Arn
  CustomDomainNameStatus:
    Value: !GetAtt CustomDomain.RegionalDomainName

          Value: "DataDogEventBridgeIntegration"

          Value: "Production"

  DataDogDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: "DataDogDLQ"
      KmsMasterKeyId: "alias/aws/sqs"
      VisibilityTimeout: 60
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "DataDogEventBridgeIntegration"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: "Production"

  DataDogDLQQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DataDogDLQ
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "events.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                "aws:SourceArn": !GetAtt DataDogEventBus.Arn

  EventBridgeDataDogRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: "EventBridgeDataDogRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "events.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SourceAccount": !Ref "AWS::AccountId"
              ArnLike:
                "aws:SourceArn": !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:event-bus/DataDogEventBus/*"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "CloudWatchLogsPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "DataDogEventBridgeIntegration"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: "Production"

  DataDogConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: "DataDogConnection"
      AuthorizationType: "API_KEY"
      Description: "DataDog log forwarding"
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: "DD-API-KEY"
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref DataDogApiKey

  DataDogApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: "DataDogApiDestination"
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt DataDogConnection.Arn
      HttpMethod: "POST"
      InvocationEndpoint: "https://http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com/api/v2/logs"
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 100

  DataDogLogForwardingRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref DataDogEventBus
      Description: "Rule to forward events from MyDataDogApp to DataDog"
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - equals:
              - !Ref EventSource
      State: "ENABLED"
      RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeDataDogRole.Arn
      Targets:
        - Id: "DataDogTarget"
          Arn: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "DataDogEventBridgeIntegration"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: "Production"

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: "ARN of the DataDog EventBus"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogEventBus.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: "ARN of the DataDog API Destination"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
  DLQUrl:
    Description: "URL of the DataDog DLQ"
    Value: !Ref DataDogDLQ
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the DataDog Connection"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogConnection.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket configured to send object creation event notifications to an SQS queue in an event-driven architecture.

Resources:
  EventsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-events-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      NotificationConfiguration:
        QueueConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Queue: !GetAtt ObjectEventsQueue.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ObjectEventsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-object-events-queue"
      VisibilityTimeout: 43200
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ObjectEventsQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref ObjectEventsQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3ToSendMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt ObjectEventsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt EventsBucket.Arn

  EventsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref EventsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt EventsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${EventsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for storing objects and sending event notifications to SQS
    Value: !Ref EventsBucket
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue receiving S3 object creation event notifications
    Value: !Ref ObjectEventsQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue for S3 object event notifications
    Value: !GetAtt ObjectEventsQueue.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning an SNS topic and EventBridge rule to forward events from source "demo.cli" to the SNS topic, with topic policy granting EventBridge publish permissions.'

Resources:
  DemoEventSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: Demo CLI Events Topic

  DemoCLIEventRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - demo.cli
      Targets:
        - Id: SNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref DemoEventSNSTopic

  DemoEventSNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref DemoEventSNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref DemoEventSNSTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt DemoCLIEventRule.Arn

Outputs:
  DemoEventSNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the Demo CLI Events SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref DemoEventSNSTopic
  DemoCLIEventRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Demo CLI EventBridge Rule
    Value: !GetAtt DemoCLIEventRule.Arn
  DemoCLIEventRuleName:
    Description: Name of the Demo CLI EventBridge Rule
    Value: !Ref DemoCLIEventRule

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that provisions an AWS B2B Data Interchange (B2BI) pipeline for transforming EDI X12_214 documents into JSON, including input/output S3 buckets, B2BI Profile, Transformer, and Pipeline.'

Parameters:
  ProfileName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'MyB2BIProfile'
    Description: 'Name of the B2BI Profile'
  BusinessContactName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Business Contact'
    Description: 'Business contact name for the Profile'
  BusinessContactEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: 'contact@example.com'
    Description: 'Business contact email for the Profile'
  BusinessContactPhone:
    Type: String
    Default: '+1-555-0123'
    Description: 'Business contact phone for the Profile'
  TransformerName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'MyX12214Transformer'
    Description: 'Name of the B2BI Transformer'
  InputBucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'b2bi-input'
    Description: 'Prefix for input S3 bucket name'
  OutputBucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'b2bi-output'
    Description: 'Prefix for output S3 bucket name'

Resources:
  InputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${InputBucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  OutputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${OutputBucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InputBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref InputBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: b2bi.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt InputBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${InputBucket.Arn}/*"

  OutputBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OutputBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: b2bi.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OutputBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${OutputBucket.Arn}/*"

  Profile:
    Type: 'AWS::B2BI::Profile'
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ProfileName
      BusinessName: !Ref BusinessContactName
      Email: !Ref BusinessContactEmail
      Phone: !Ref BusinessContactPhone
      Logging: ENABLED
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  Transformer:
    Type: 'AWS::B2BI::Transformer'
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref TransformerName
      Status: active
      Mapping:
        TemplateLanguage: JSONATA
        Template: |
          version: "2021-01-01"
          root:
            shipmentStatus:
              controlNumber: "{{ST02}}"
              implementationId: "{{ST03}}"
            carrierInfo:
              identifier: "{{N101}}"
              name: "{{N102}}"
            shipmentId: "{{L1101}}"
            date: "{{DTM02}}"
      SampleDocument: |
        ISA*00*           *00*           *ZZ*12345       *ZZ*67890      *240101*1200*U*00401*000000001*0*P*>~
        GS*SS*12345*67890*20240101*1200*1*X*004010~
        ST*214*0001~
        B2*0001**PP~
        N1*SF*Carrier ABC*92*CARRIERID~
        L11*SHIP123~
        DTM*011*202401011200~
        SE*7*0001~
        GE*1*1~
        IEA*1*000000001~
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  InputBucketName:
    Description: Name of the input S3 bucket for raw EDI files
    Value: !Ref InputBucket
  OutputBucketName:
    Description: Name of the output S3 bucket for transformed JSON data
    Value: !Ref OutputBucket
  ProfileId:
    Description: ID of the B2BI Profile
    Value: !Ref Profile
  TransformerId:
    Description: ID of the B2BI Transformer
    Value: !Ref Transformer

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated monitoring for Secrets Manager lifecycle events with email alerts

Parameters:
  NotificationEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: 'alerts@example.com'
    Description: Email address for alerts
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: 'dev'
    Description: Environment tag value

Resources:
  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretsAlertsTopic'
      DisplayName: Secrets Manager Critical Events
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowEventBridgeToPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopic

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref NotificationEmail

  EventBridgePublishRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeSNSRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PublishToSNSTopic
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  SecretsManagerApiCallsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretsManagerApiCallsRule'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          eventName:
            - CreateSecret
            - DeleteSecret
            - UpdateSecret
            - TagResource
            - UntagResource
            - PutSecretValue
            - RotateSecret
            - CancelRotateSecret
            - StopReplicationToReplica
            - RemoveRegionsFromReplication
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref SNSTopic
          Id: SendToSns
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgePublishRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              accountId: "$.account"
              region: "$.region"
              eventName: "$.detail.eventName"
              secretArn: "$.detail.resources[0].ARN"
              timestamp: "$.time"
            InputTemplate: >-
              {
                "subject": "Secrets Manager Event: <eventName>",
                "message": "Event: <eventName>\nSecret ARN: <secretArn>\nTimestamp: <timestamp>\nRegion: <region>\nAccount ID: <accountId>"
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Topic for Secrets Manager alerts
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule capturing Secrets Manager events
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerApiCallsRule
  SNSSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Subscription (check email to confirm subscription)
    Value: !Ref SNSSubscription

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS-to-SQS fanout with filtered routing for temperature and humidity metrics'

Parameters:
  StackNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MetricsFanout

Resources:
  CentralMetricsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}CentralMetricsTopic'
      DisplayName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}CentralMetricsTopic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref StackNamePrefix

  AllMetricsDlq:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-AllMetricsDlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref StackNamePrefix

  TemperatureDlq:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-TemperatureDlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref StackNamePrefix

  HumidityDlq:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-HumidityDlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref StackNamePrefix

  AllMetricsSqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-AllMetricsSqsQueue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt AllMetricsDlq.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref StackNamePrefix

  TemperatureSqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: TemperatureSqsQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TemperatureDlq.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref StackNamePrefix

  HumiditySqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: HumiditySqsQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt HumidityDlq.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref StackNamePrefix

  AllMetricsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralMetricsTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt AllMetricsSqsQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
    DependsOn:
      - AllMetricsDlq

  TemperatureSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralMetricsTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      FilterPolicy:
        MetricType:
          - Temperature
    DependsOn:
      - TemperatureDlq

  HumiditySubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralMetricsTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      FilterPolicy:
        MetricType:
          - Humidity
    DependsOn:
      - HumidityDlq

Outputs:
  CentralTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the central SNS topic
    Value: !Ref CentralMetricsTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CentralTopicArn'

  AllMetricsSqsQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the AllMetrics SQS queue
    Value: !Ref AllMetricsSqsQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsSqsQueueUrl'

  AllMetricsSqsQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the AllMetrics SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt AllMetricsSqsQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsSqsQueueArn'

  TemperatureSqsQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the Temperature SQS queue
    Value: !Ref TemperatureSqsQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureSqsQueueUrl'

  TemperatureSqsQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the Temperature SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureSqsQueueArn'

  HumiditySqsQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the Humidity SQS queue
    Value: !Ref HumiditySqsQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumiditySqsQueueUrl'

  HumiditySqsQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the Humidity SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumiditySqsQueueArn'

  AllMetricsDlqArn:
    Description: ARN of the AllMetrics DLQ
    Value: !GetAtt AllMetricsDlq.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsDlqArn'

  TemperatureDlqArn:
    Description: ARN of the Temperature DLQ
    Value: !GetAtt TemperatureDlq.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureDlqArn'

  HumidityDlqArn:
    Description: ARN of the Humidity DLQ
    Value: !GetAtt HumidityDlq.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumidityDlqArn'

  AllMetricsSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the AllMetrics SNS subscription
    Value: !Ref AllMetricsSubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsSubscriptionArn'

  TemperatureSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Temperature SNS subscription
    Value: !Ref TemperatureSubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureSubscriptionArn'

  HumiditySubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Humidity SNS subscription
    Value: !Ref HumiditySubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumiditySubscriptionArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template that creates an event-driven integration between DynamoDB
  streams and EventBridge, routing real-time INSERT and MODIFY events from a DynamoDB
  table to a centralized custom EventBridge event bus for downstream processing.

Parameters:
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Type: String
    Default: OrdersTable
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
  EventBusName:
    Type: String
    Default: CentralEventBus
    Description: Name of the custom EventBridge event bus

Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Ref DynamoDBTableName
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: expirationTime
        Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventDrivenOrders
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  CentralEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref EventBusName
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventDrivenOrders
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DefaultArchive:
    Type: AWS::Events::Archive
    Properties:
      ArchiveName: !Sub "${EventBusName}-default-archive"
      SourceArn: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
      EventPattern: "{}"
      RetentionDays: 30

  InsertLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/pipes/${AWS::StackName}-InsertPipe"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventDrivenOrders
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ModifyLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/pipes/${AWS::StackName}-ModifyPipe"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventDrivenOrders
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InsertPipeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InsertPipePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/pipes/${AWS::StackName}-*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                Resource: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventDrivenOrders
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ModifyPipeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ModifyPipePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/pipes/${AWS::StackName}-*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                Resource: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventDrivenOrders
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InsertPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Source: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
      SourceParameters:
        FilterCriteria:
          Filters:
            - Pattern: '{"dynamodb": {"eventName": ["INSERT"]}}'
      Target: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt InsertPipeRole.Arn
      Tags:
        Project: EventDrivenOrders
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ModifyPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Source: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
      SourceParameters:
        FilterCriteria:
          Filters:
            - Pattern: '{"dynamodb": {"eventName": ["MODIFY"]}}'
      Target: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt ModifyPipeRole.Arn
      Tags:
        Project: EventDrivenOrders
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  DynamoDBTableArn:
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
  DynamoDBStreamArn:
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
  EventBusArn:
    Value: !Ref CentralEventBus
  InsertPipeArn:
    Value: !Ref InsertPipe

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge Pipes workflow to enrich SQS messages with ZIP code API data from https://api.zippopotam.us and log enriched results to CloudWatch Logs for data augmentation and monitoring.'

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: EnrichmentPipeQueue
    Description: Name for the SQS Queue
  LogGroupNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/events/
    Description: Prefix for the CloudWatch Log Group name

Resources:
  EnrichmentQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventEnrichmentPipe
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EnrichmentLogGroup:
deploy_logs: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template provisioning an EventBridge-to-Kinesis integration for real-time event streaming, routing events from source "my-application" to a Kinesis data stream.

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1000
  RetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 24
    MaxValue: 8760

Resources:
  MyApplicationEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-MyApplicationEventBus"

  MyApplicationKinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-MyApplicationKinesisStream"
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis

  EventBridgeKinesisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeKinesisRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-KinesisPutPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                Resource: !GetAtt MyApplicationKinesisStream.Arn

  MyApplicationToKinesisRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: Route events from source "my-application" to Kinesis data stream for processing
      EventBusName: !Ref MyApplicationEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - my-application
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: SendToKinesis
          Arn: !GetAtt MyApplicationKinesisStream.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeKinesisRole.Arn
          KinesisParameters:
            PartitionKeyPath: "$.id"

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus capturing application events
    Value: !Ref MyApplicationEventBus
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis data stream for event ingestion and buffering
    Value: !GetAtt MyApplicationKinesisStream.Arn
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule routing "my-application" events to Kinesis
    Value: !Ref MyApplicationToKinesisRule
  IAMRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM Role granting EventBridge permissions to publish to Kinesis
    Value: !Ref EventBridgeKinesisRole

Description: 'Event-driven AWS Batch pipeline with SQS and EventBridge Pipes'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: BatchPipeline

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: BatchPipeline

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: BatchPipeline

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: BatchPipeline

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning EC2 instances (Linux/Windows), SSM Document and Association for cross-platform Hello World scripts triggered every 15 minutes by EventBridge Scheduler, with logs in S3.'

Parameters:
  LinuxAmi:
    Type: String
    Default: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0
  WindowsAmi:
    Type: String
    Default: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EC2 instances allowing SSH, RDP inbound and all outbound'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3389
          ToPort: 3389
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  EC2Role:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "EventBridge integration with Shopify's product creation API to automate product updates based on application events from MyShopifyApp source."

Parameters:
  ShopifyAdminApiKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: "placeholder"
  ShopName:
    Type: String
    Default: "testanu"
  ShopifyApiVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: "2024-01"

Resources:
  ShopifyApiKeySecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      SecretString: !Ref ShopifyAdminApiKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration

  ShopifyEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: ShopifyEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration

  ShopifyConnection:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure API Gateway with DynamoDB for Music CRUD

Resources:
  Music:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Music-${AWS::Region}"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: Id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: Artist
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: Id
          KeyType: HASH
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: Artist-Index
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: Artist
              KeyType: HASH
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod

  ApiGatewayCloudWatchRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod

  MusicApiLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/apigateway/${MusicApi}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod

  ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${Music}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod

  MusicApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MusicManagementAPI
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - '*/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod

  MusicResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MusicApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: music

  ArtistResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !Ref MusicResource
      PathPart: '{artist}'

  PostMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/PutItem'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub |
            {
              "TableName": "$util.escapeJavaScript('${Music}')",
              "Item": {
                "Id": {"S": "$util.autoId()"},
                "Artist": {"S": "$input.json('$.artist')"},
                "Album": {"S": "$input.json('$.album')"}
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
                $util.toJson($inputRoot)

  GetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ArtistResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/Query'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub |
            {
              "TableName": "$util.escapeJavaScript('${Music}')",
              "IndexName": "Artist-Index",
              "KeyConditionExpression": "Artist = :artist",
              "ExpressionAttributeValues": {
                ":artist": {"S": "$input.params('artist')}
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
                $util.toJson($inputRoot)

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
    DependsOn:
      - PostMethod
      - GetMethod

  ApiStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      TracingEnabled: true
      AccessLogSetting:
        DestinationArn: !GetAtt MusicApiLogGroup.Arn
        Format: >-
          {
            "requestId":"$context.requestId",
            "ip": "$context.identity.sourceIp",
            "requestTime":"$context.requestTime",
            "httpMethod":"$context.httpMethod",
            "resourcePath":"$context.resourcePath",
            "status":"$context.status",
            "protocol":"$context.protocol",
            "responseLength":"$context.responseLength"
          }
      MethodSettings:
        - HttpMethod: '*'
          ResourcePath: '/*'
          LoggingLevel: INFO
          DataTraceEnabled: true
          MetricsEnabled: true

  MusicUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      UsagePlanName: MusicUsagePlan
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref MusicApi
          Stage: prod
      Throttle:
        BurstLimit: 200
        RateLimit: 100
      Quota:
        Limit: 10000
        Period: DAY
    DependsOn: ApiStage

  MusicApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Name: MusicApiKey
      Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod

  UsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref MusicApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref MusicUsagePlan

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: Music API Endpoint URL
    Value: !Sub 'https://${MusicApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/music'

  ApiKeyValue:
    Description: API Key ID (fetch value securely via CLI/Console)
    Value: !Ref MusicApiKey

  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: DynamoDB Music Table Name
    Value: !Ref Music

  UsagePlanId:
    Description: Usage Plan ID
    Value: !Ref MusicUsagePlan

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure REST API Gateway integrated with Amazon SES for sending templated emails with validation, rate limits, and API key authentication'

Parameters:
  ApiName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecureEmailAPI
    Description: 'Name of the API Gateway REST API'
  ThrottleRate:
    Type: Number
    Default: 500
    Description: 'Throttle rate limit (requests per second)'
  ThrottleBurst:
    Type: Number
    Default: 500
    Description: 'Throttle burst limit'
  MonthlyQuota:
    Type: Number
    Default: 10000
    Description: 'Monthly quota limit'
  FromEmailVerification:
    Type: String
    Default: 'noreply@example.com'
    Description: 'SES verified email address or domain to use as From header (must be verified in SES beforehand)'

  RestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi

      Name: !Ref ApiName
      Description: 'Secure Email Sending API'
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - '*/*'

  EmailRequestModel:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Model
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      Name: EmailRequestModel
      ContentType: 'application/json'
      Schema: |
        {
          "type": "object",
          "title": "EmailRequestModel",
          "required": ["to", "from", "subject"],
          "properties": {
            "to": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "minItems": 1,
              "maxItems": 50
            },
            "from": {
              "type": "string",
              "maxLength": 1000

            "subject": {
              "type": "string",
              "maxLength": 998

            "text": {
              "type": "string",
              "maxLength": 262144

            "html": {

              "maxLength": 262144
            }
          }
        }

  EmailValidator:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RequestValidator
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      Name: EmailValidator
      ValidateRequestBody: true
      ValidateRequestParameters: false

  EmailResource:

            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                "aws:SourceArn": !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SESSendEmailPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ses:SendEmail
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
                    ses:FromAddress: !Ref FromEmailVerification

  EmailApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      Description: 'Production deployment of secure email API'
    DependsOn:
      - EmailPostMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref EmailApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      TracingEnabled: true
      MethodSettings:
        - HttpMethod: "*"
          ResourcePath: "/*"
          CachingEnabled: false
          DataTraceEnabled: true
          LoggingLevel: INFO
          MetricsEnabled: true

  EmailUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref RestApi
          Stage: prod
      Description: 'Usage plan for secure email API with throttling and quotas'
      Quota:
        Limit: !Ref MonthlyQuota
        Period: MONTH
        Offset: 0
      Throttle:
        RateLimit: !Ref ThrottleRate
        BurstLimit: !Ref ThrottleBurst
    DependsOn: ProdStage

  EmailApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      StageKeys:
        - RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
          StageName: prod
      Description: 'API Key required for email sending endpoint'
    DependsOn: ProdStage

  EmailUsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref EmailApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref EmailUsagePlan

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: 'HTTPS POST endpoint for sending emails (requires API Key)'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/email'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ApiName}-ApiEndpoint'

  ApiKeyId:
    Description: 'ID of the API Key. Retrieve value post-deployment via AWS CLI: aws apigateway get-api-key --api-key ${ApiKeyId} --include-value (store securely in SSM Parameter Store or Secrets Manager)'
    Value: !Ref EmailApiKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ApiName}-ApiKeyId'

  UsagePlanId:
    Description: 'ID of the Usage Plan'
    Value: !Ref EmailUsagePlan
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ApiName}-UsagePlanId'
