final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning a REST API Gateway integrated with Amazon Kinesis Data Streams for HTTP-based ingestion (PUT records) and retrieval (GET records) without AWS SDK dependencies. Includes stream metadata endpoints, IAM roles, CORS, logging, and best practices security.'

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyDataStream
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream (must be unique in account/region)
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis stream
  ApiName:
    Type: String
    Default: KinesisApi
    Description: Name of the API Gateway REST API
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: Name of the API Gateway stage

Resources:
  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref StreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ApiGatewayKinesisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${ApiName}KinesisRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KinesisAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:SubscribeToShard
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:kinesis:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stream/${StreamName}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ApiGatewayCloudWatchRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${ApiName}CloudWatchRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: 'arn:aws:logs:*:*:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ApiName
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - application/octet-stream
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  StreamProxyResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: '{stream}'

  PutRecordResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamProxyResource
      PathPart: put-record

  PutRecordsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamProxyResource
      PathPart: put-records

  DescribeResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamProxyResource
      PathPart: describe

  ShardsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamProxyResource
      PathPart: shards

  ShardIdResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardsResource
      PathPart: '{shardId}'

  GetShardIteratorResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardIdResource
      PathPart: get-shard-iterator

  ShardIteratorsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardIdResource
      PathPart: shard-iterators

  ShardIteratorResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardIteratorsResource
      PathPart: '{shardIterator}'

  GetRecordsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardIteratorResource
      PathPart: get-records

  PutRecordMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref PutRecordResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecord'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')",
              "Data": "$util.base64Encode($input.json('$.data'))",
              "PartitionKey": "$input.json('$.partitionKey')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'

  PutRecordOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref PutRecordResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode":200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ''

  PutRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref PutRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecords'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')",
              "Records": [
                #if( $input.json('$.records').size() > 0 )
                #foreach( $record in $input.json('$.records') )
                {
                  "Data": "$util.base64Encode($record.data)",
                  "PartitionKey": "$record.partitionKey"
                }#if( $foreach.hasNext ),#end
                #end
                #end
              ]
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'

  PutRecordsOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref PutRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode":200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ''

  DescribeMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref DescribeResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/DescribeStream'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: $input.path('$.StreamDescription')

  DescribeOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref DescribeResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode":200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ''

  GetShardIteratorMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref GetShardIteratorResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetShardIterator'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')",
              "ShardId": "$input.params('shardId')",
              "ShardIteratorType": "$input.json('$.shardIteratorType')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: $input.path('$.ShardIterator')

  GetShardIteratorOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref GetShardIteratorResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode":200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ''

  GetRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref GetRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetRecords'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')",
              "ShardIterator": "$input.params('shardIterator')",
              "Limit": $input.json('$.limit')
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
                {
                  "Records": [
                    #foreach($record in $inputRoot.Records)
                    {
                      "Data": "$util.base64Decode($record.Data)",
                      "PartitionKey": "$record.PartitionKey",
                      "SequenceNumber": "$record.SequenceNumber",
                      "ApproximateArrivalTimestamp": "$record.ApproximateArrivalTimestamp"
                    }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                    #end
                  ],
                  "NextShardIterator": "$inputRoot.NextShardIterator"
                }

  GetRecordsOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref GetRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode":200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ''

  AccessLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/apigateway/${ApiName}/${StageName}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      Description: !Sub "Deployment ${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::StackId}"
    DependsOn:
      - PutRecordMethod
      - PutRecordOptionsMethod
      - PutRecordsMethod
      - PutRecordsOptionsMethod
      - DescribeMethod
      - DescribeOptionsMethod
      - GetShardIteratorMethod
      - GetShardIteratorOptionsMethod
      - GetRecordsMethod
      - GetRecordsOptionsMethod

  Stage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref Deployment
      StageName: !Ref StageName
      MethodSettings:
        - HttpMethod: '*'
          LoggingLevel: INFO
          DataTraceEnabled: true
          MetricsEnabled: true
          CachingEnabled: false
      AccessLogSetting:
        DestinationArn: !GetAtt AccessLogGroup.Arn
        Format: >-
          {
            "requestId":"$context.requestId",
            "ip": "$context.identity.sourceIp",
            "requestTime":"$context.requestTime",
            "httpMethod":"$context.httpMethod",
            "resourcePath":"$context.resourcePath",
            "status":"$context.status",
            "responseLength":"$context.responseLength"
          }

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: 'API Gateway endpoint for HTTP interaction with Kinesis (e.g., POST /{streamName}/put-record, GET /{streamName}/describe, etc.)'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${StageName}/'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ApiEndpoint"

  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the provisioned Kinesis Data Stream'
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-KinesisStreamArn"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Basic EFS for testing shared storage in us-east-1a

Parameters:
  VPCCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the public subnet

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TestVPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TestIGW'

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCIDR
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TestPublicSubnet-us-east-1a'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TestPublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      Encrypted: true
      BackupPolicy:
        Status: ENABLED
      LifecyclePolicies:
        - TransitionToIA: AFTER_30_DAYS
      FileSystemPolicy: |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "DenyUnencryptedTransport",
              "Effect": "Deny",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": "*",
              "Resource": "*",
              "Condition": {
                "Bool": {
                  "aws:SecureTransport": "false"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TestEFS'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedStorage

  EFSAccessSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow NFS access to EFS from VPC CIDR
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSAccessSG'

  MountTarget:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSAccessSecurityGroup

Outputs:
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: The ID of the EFS File System
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSFileSystemId'

  MountTargetDnsName:
    Description: DNS name of the EFS File System (fs-xxx.efs.region.amazonaws.com) for mounting
    Value: !Sub "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MountTargetDnsName'

  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: ID of the public subnet hosting the EFS Mount Target
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Automated solution for managing AWS Security Hub controls, selectively disabling specific CIS Benchmarks and AWS Foundational Security Best Practices controls via a Lambda function.'

Parameters:
  DisableCISControls:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of CIS Benchmark control IDs to disable, e.g., 1.1,1.2'
  DisableFSBPControls:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of AWS FSBP control IDs to disable, e.g., EC2.1,EC2.2'
  LogRetentionInDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 3653
    Description: 'Retention period in days for CloudWatch Logs (1-3653)'
  PermissionsBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM Permissions Boundary to apply to the Lambda execution role (optional)'

Conditions:
  UsePermissionsBoundary:
    Fn::Not:
      - Fn::Equals:
          - !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
          - ''

Resources:
  SecurityHubControlManagerLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/lambda/SecurityHubControlManagerFunction-${AWS::StackName}'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionInDays
      KmsKeyId: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/aws/logs'

  SecurityHubControlManagerExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'SecurityHubControlManagerExecutionRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      PermissionsBoundary:
        Fn::If:
          - UsePermissionsBoundary
          - !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SecurityHubControlManagerInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - securityhub:DescribeStandardsControls
                  - securityhub:UpdateStandardsControl
                  - securityhub:BatchUpdateFindings
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  SecurityHubControlManagerFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub 'SecurityHubControlManagerFunction-${AWS::StackName}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 300
      MemorySize: 512
      ReservedConcurrentExecutions: 1
      Environment:
        Variables:
          CIS_CONTROLS_TO_DISABLE: !Ref DisableCISControls
          FSBP_CONTROLS_TO_DISABLE: !Ref DisableFSBPControls
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          import logging

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              sh_client = boto3.client('securityhub')

              cis_disable = [c.strip() for c in os.environ.get('CIS_CONTROLS_TO_DISABLE', '').split(',') if c.strip()]
              fsbp_disable = [c.strip() for c in os.environ.get('FSBP_CONTROLS_TO_DISABLE', '').split(',') if c.strip()]

              standards = [
                  {
                      'standard_id': 'cis-aws-foundations-benchmark/v1.4.0',
                      'controls_to_disable': cis_disable
                  },
                  {
                      'standard_id': 'aws-foundational-security-best-practices/v1.0.0',
                      'controls_to_disable': fsbp_disable
                  }
              ]

              results = []
              for std in standards:
                  standards_arn = f"arn:aws:securityhub:::standards/{std['standard_id']}/1.0.0"
                  try:
                      desc_response = sh_client.describe_standards(StandardsArns=[standards_arn])
                      if not desc_response.get('Standards'):
                          logger.error(f"Standard {std['standard_id']} not found or not enabled.")
                          results.append({'standard': std['standard_id'], 'status': 'not_enabled'})
                          continue
                      subscription_arn = desc_response['Standards'][0]['StandardsSubscriptionArn']
                      controls_response = sh_client.describe_standards_controls(StandardsSubscriptionArn=subscription_arn)
                      controls = controls_response['Controls']
                      for control in controls:
                          control_id = control['ControlId']
                          if control_id in std['controls_to_disable']:
                              logger.info(f"Disabling control {control_id} in standard {std['standard_id']}")
                              sh_client.update_standards_control(
                                  StandardsControlArn=control['StandardsControlArn'],
                                  Disabled=True,
                                  ControlStatusDisabledReason='Disabled per organizational policy via CloudFormation automation'
                              )
                              results.append({'standard': std['standard_id'], 'control': control_id, 'status': 'disabled'})
                  except Exception as e:
                      logger.error(f"Error processing standard {std['standard_id']}: {str(e)}")
                      results.append({'standard': std['standard_id'], 'error': str(e)})

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps({'results': results})
              }

  SecurityHubControlManagerFunctionVersion:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Version
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref SecurityHubControlManagerFunction
      Description: 'Production version for SecurityHub control management automation'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionQualifiedArn:
    Description: 'Qualified ARN of the Lambda function version for safe invocation (e.g., via EventBridge or manual trigger)'
    Value: !Sub '${SecurityHubControlManagerFunctionVersion.FunctionArn}:${SecurityHubControlManagerFunctionVersion.Version}'
  LogGroupName:
    Description: 'CloudWatch Log Group for the Lambda function logs'
    Value: !Ref SecurityHubControlManagerLogGroup
  RoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM execution role for the Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerExecutionRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure and compliant AWS Config setup with customizable retention policies and delivery configurations, which automates resource configuration tracking and audit logging across an AWS account.

Parameters:
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2557
    Description: Number of days to retain AWS Config data (approx 7 years)
  DeliveryFrequency:
    Type: String
    Default: Hourly
    AllowedValues: [Hourly, Daily]
    Description: Frequency for config snapshot delivery
  ExistingS3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of existing S3 bucket for Config snapshots (leave empty to create new)
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: ARN of IAM permission boundary to apply to roles (optional)
  ConfigRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: ConfigServiceRole
    Description: Name for the AWS Config service role
  S3BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9-]*$'
    Description: Prefix for the auto-generated S3 bucket name

Conditions:
  CreateNewBucket: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ExistingS3BucketName, '']]
  IsHourly: !Equals [!Ref DeliveryFrequency, 'Hourly']
  UsePermissionBoundary: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, '']]
  HasPrefix: !Not [!Equals [!Ref S3BucketNamePrefix, '']]

Resources:
  ConfigSnapshotsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Condition: CreateNewBucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !If [HasPrefix, !Sub ['${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-config-snapshots-${S3BucketNamePrefix}', {S3BucketNamePrefix: !Ref S3BucketNamePrefix}], !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-config-snapshots']
      ObjectLockEnabled: false
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  ConfigSnapshotsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Condition: CreateNewBucket
    DependsOn: ConfigSnapshotsBucket
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ConfigSnapshotsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AWSConfigBucketDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: {Service: config.amazonaws.com}
            Action: [s3:PutObject]
            Resource: !Sub '${ConfigSnapshotsBucket}/*'
          - Sid: AWSConfigBucketConfig
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: {Service: config.amazonaws.com}
            Action: [s3:GetBucketAcl]
            Resource: !Ref ConfigSnapshotsBucket
          - Sid: AWSConfigBucketDeliveryPolicy
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: {Service: config.amazonaws.com}
            Action: [s3:PutBucketPolicy]
            Resource: !Ref ConfigSnapshotsBucket
          - Sid: RequireSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Ref ConfigSnapshotsBucket
              - !Sub '${ConfigSnapshotsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

  ConfigNotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub 'AWS Config ${AWS::Region} Notifications'

  ConfigNotificationTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: {Service: config.amazonaws.com}
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref ConfigNotificationTopic
      Topics: [!Ref ConfigNotificationTopic]

  ConfigServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref ConfigRoleName
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: {Service: config.amazonaws.com}
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSConfigRole
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [UsePermissionBoundary, !Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']

  DefaultConfigDeliveryChannel:
    Type: AWS::Config::DeliveryChannel
    DependsOn: [ConfigServiceRole, ConfigSnapshotsBucketPolicy]
    Properties:
      S3BucketName: !If [CreateNewBucket, !Ref ConfigSnapshotsBucket, !Ref ExistingS3BucketName]
      SnsTopicARN: !Ref ConfigNotificationTopic
      ConfigSnapshotDeliveryProperties:
        DeliveryFrequency: !If [IsHourly, 'OneHour', 'TwentyFourHours']

  DefaultConfigRecorder:
    Type: AWS::Config::ConfigurationRecorder
    Properties:
      Name: default
      RoleARN: !GetAtt ConfigServiceRole.Arn
      RecordingGroup:
        AllSupported: true
        IncludeGlobalResourceTypes: true

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: {Service: lambda.amazonaws.com}
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConfigRetentionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - config:PutRetentionConfiguration
                  - config:DeleteRetentionConfiguration
                  - config:DescribeRetentionConfigurations
                  - config:StartConfigurationRecorder
                  - config:StopConfigurationRecorder
                Resource: '*'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [UsePermissionBoundary, !Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']

  RetentionCustomResourceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub 'ConfigRetentionCustomResource-${AWS::Region}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import urllib.request
          import traceback

          def handler(event, context):
              try:
                  request_type = event['RequestType']
                  props = event['ResourceProperties']
                  retention_days = int(props['RetentionDays'])
                  client = boto3.client('config')
                  physical_id = 'default'

                  if request_type in ['Create', 'Update']:
                      client.put_retention_configuration(
                          RetentionConfigurationName='default',
                          RetentionPeriodInDays=retention_days
                      )
                      try:
                          client.start_configuration_recorder(
                              ConfigurationRecorderName='default'
                          )
                      except Exception as e:
                          print(f"Start configuration recorder: {str(e)}")
                  elif request_type == 'Delete':
                      try:
                          client.delete_retention_configuration(
                              RetentionConfigurationName='default'
                          )
                      except client.exceptions.NoSuchRetentionConfigurationException:
                          pass
                      try:
                          client.stop_configuration_recorder(
                              ConfigurationRecorderName='default'
                          )
                      except Exception as e:
                          print(f"Stop configuration recorder: {str(e)}")

                  send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', physical_id)
                  return {'PhysicalResourceId': physical_id}
              except Exception as e:
                  print(traceback.format_exc())
                  send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', 'default', str(e))
                  raise e

          def send_response(event, context, response_status, physical_resource_id, reason=None):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_body = {
                  'Status': response_status,
                  'Reason': reason or f'See the details in CloudWatch Log Group: {context.log_group_name} Log Stream: {context.log_stream_name}',
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id,
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': {}
              }
              json_response_body = json.dumps(response_body)

              headers = {
                  'content-type': 'application/json',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_response_body))
              }

              print("ResponseURL: %s" % response_url)
              print("ResponseBody: %s" % json_response_body)

              req = urllib.request.Request(response_url, data=json_response_body.encode('utf-8'), method='PUT')
              for key in headers:
                  req.add_header(key, headers[key])

              with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                  print(response.read())

              return

  RetentionConfig:
    Type: Custom::RetentionConfiguration
    DependsOn: DefaultConfigRecorder
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt RetentionCustomResourceLambda.Arn
      RetentionDays: !Ref RetentionDays

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket used for Config snapshots
    Value: !If [CreateNewBucket, !Ref ConfigSnapshotsBucket, !Ref ExistingS3BucketName]
  SnsTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for Config notifications
    Value: !Ref ConfigNotificationTopic
  ConfigRecorderArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Config Recorder
    Value: !Sub ['arn:${AWS::Partition}:config:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:config-recorder/config/${RecorderName}', {RecorderName: !Ref DefaultConfigRecorder}]
  ConfigRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for AWS Config service
    Value: !GetAtt ConfigServiceRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Account-wide IAM password policy enforcement with customizable security requirements and dynamic Lambda management for apply/remove operations. Optional permission boundary for IAM users/roles enforcing MFA for changes.'

Parameters:
  MinimumPasswordLength:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14
    MinValue: 6
    MaxValue: 128
    Description: 'Minimum password length (6-128 characters)'
  RequireUppercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: 'Require uppercase characters'
  RequireLowercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: 'Require lowercase characters'
  RequireNumbers:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: 'Require numbers'
  RequireSymbols:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: 'Require symbols'
  MaxPasswordAge:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1095
    Description: 'Maximum password age in days (1-1095)'
  PasswordReusePrevention:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 24
    Description: 'Number of previous passwords to prevent reuse (1-24)'
  AllowUsersPasswordReset:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: 'Allow users to change their own password'
  HardExpiry:
    Type: String
    Default: "false"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: 'Whether expired passwords can be reused after HardExpiry period'
  EnablePermissionBoundary:
    Type: String
    Default: "false"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Description: 'Enable creation of optional IAM permission boundary policy'

Conditions:
  CreatePermissionBoundary: !Equals [!Ref EnablePermissionBoundary, "true"]

Resources:
  PasswordPolicyLambdaRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PasswordPolicyLambdaRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: '/'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PasswordPolicyManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:GetAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:UpdateAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:DeleteAccountPasswordPolicy
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PasswordPolicyLambdaRole'

  PasswordPolicyManager:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PasswordPolicyManager'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import logging
          import os
          import boto3
          from botocore.exceptions import ClientError

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              iam = boto3.client('iam')
              action = event.get('action')
              if action == 'apply':
                  try:
                      resp = iam.get_account_password_policy()
                      policy = resp['PasswordPolicy']
                  except ClientError as e:
                      if e.response['Error']['Code'] == 'NoSuchEntity':
                          policy = {}
                      else:
                          logger.error(f"Error getting policy: {e}")
                          raise
                  env_defaults = {
                      'MinimumPasswordLength': int(os.environ.get('MinimumPasswordLength', '14')),
                      'MaxPasswordAge': int(os.environ.get('MaxPasswordAge', '90')),
                      'PasswordReusePrevention': int(os.environ.get('PasswordReusePrevention', '24')),
                      'RequireUppercaseCharacters': os.environ.get('RequireUppercaseCharacters', 'true').lower() in ('true', '1', 'yes'),
                      'RequireLowercaseCharacters': os.environ.get('RequireLowercaseCharacters', 'true').lower() in ('true', '1', 'yes'),
                      'RequireNumbers': os.environ.get('RequireNumbers', 'true').lower() in ('true', '1', 'yes'),
                      'RequireSymbols': os.environ.get('RequireSymbols', 'true').lower() in ('true', '1', 'yes'),
                      'AllowUsersPasswordReset': os.environ.get('AllowUsersPasswordReset', 'true').lower() in ('true', '1', 'yes'),
                      'HardExpiry': os.environ.get('HardExpiry', 'false').lower() in ('true', '1', 'yes')
                  }
                  for k, v in env_defaults.items():
                      policy.setdefault(k, v)
                  params = event.get('params', {})
                  bool_fields = ['RequireUppercaseCharacters', 'RequireLowercaseCharacters', 'RequireNumbers', 'RequireSymbols', 'AllowUsersPasswordReset', 'HardExpiry']
                  num_fields = ['MinimumPasswordLength', 'MaxPasswordAge', 'PasswordReusePrevention']
                  for k, v in params.items():
                      if k in bool_fields:
                          policy[k] = v if isinstance(v, bool) else (str(v).lower() in ('true', '1', 'yes'))
                      elif k in num_fields:
                          policy[k] = int(v)
                      else:
                          policy[k] = v
                  iam.update_account_password_policy(**policy)
                  logger.info(f"Applied policy: {json.dumps(policy, default=str)}")
                  return {'status': 'success', 'policy': policy}
              elif action == 'remove':
                  iam.delete_account_password_policy()
                  logger.info("Removed account password policy")
                  return {'status': 'success'}
              else:
                  return {'status': 'error', 'message': 'Must specify "action": "apply" or "remove"'}
      Environment:
        Variables:
          MinimumPasswordLength: !Ref MinimumPasswordLength
          RequireUppercaseCharacters: !Ref RequireUppercaseCharacters
          RequireLowercaseCharacters: !Ref RequireLowercaseCharacters
          RequireNumbers: !Ref RequireNumbers
          RequireSymbols: !Ref RequireSymbols
          MaxPasswordAge: !Ref MaxPasswordAge
          PasswordReusePrevention: !Ref PasswordReusePrevention
          AllowUsersPasswordReset: !Ref AllowUsersPasswordReset
          HardExpiry: !Ref HardExpiry
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PasswordPolicyManager'

  PermissionBoundaryPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Condition: CreatePermissionBoundary
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PermissionBoundary'
      Description: 'Restrictive permission boundary: allows IAM read-only access always, full IAM access only with MFA present.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'iam:Get*'
              - 'iam:List*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: 'iam:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: true

Outputs:
  PasswordPolicyStatus:
    Description: 'Account-wide IAM password policy applied successfully with provided parameters.'
    Value: 'Applied'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of Lambda function for dynamic password policy management.'
    Value: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyManager.Arn
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Condition: CreatePermissionBoundary
    Description: 'ARN of the managed policy to use as PermissionBoundary for IAM users/roles. Allows read-only IAM always; requires MFA for other IAM actions.'
    Value: !Ref PermissionBoundaryPolicy
  LambdaUsageInstructions:
    Description: |
      Invoke the Lambda function (ARN above) with events like:
      Apply: {"action": "apply", "params": {"MinimumPasswordLength":14, "RequireUppercaseCharacters":true, "RequireLowercaseCharacters":true, "RequireNumbers":true, "RequireSymbols":true, "MaxPasswordAge":90, "PasswordReusePrevention":24, "AllowUsersPasswordReset":true, "HardExpiry":false}}
      Provided params override fetched current policy values (or stack parameter defaults if no policy).
      Remove: {"action": "remove"}
    Value: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyManager.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Centralized SNS Alerting System with Fallback'

Parameters:
  PrimaryTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: CentralAlertsTopic
    Description: Name for the primary SNS topic
  FallbackEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Email address for fallback notifications
  EmailAddress1:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: First email address for subscriptions (leave empty if unused)
  EmailAddress2:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Second email address for subscriptions (leave empty if unused)
  HttpsEndpoint1:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: First HTTPS endpoint for subscriptions (leave empty if unused)
  HttpsEndpoint2:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Second HTTPS endpoint for subscriptions (leave empty if unused)
  AlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
    Description: Threshold for failed notifications alarm
  KmsKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional KMS key ARN for SNS encryption

Conditions:
  KmsProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyArn, '']]
  FallbackEmailProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref FallbackEmail, '']]
  Email1Provided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref EmailAddress1, '']]
  Email2Provided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref EmailAddress2, '']]
  Https1Provided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref HttpsEndpoint1, '']]
  Https2Provided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref HttpsEndpoint2, '']]

Resources:
  PrimarySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref PrimaryTopicName
      DisplayName: Centralized Alerting System
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [KmsProvided, !Ref KmsKeyArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrimarySNSPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyCrossAccount
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: AllowAccountOwner
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAlarms
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudwatch:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alarm:*'
          - Sid: AllowRDS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:rds:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'
          - Sid: AllowS3
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: 'arn:aws:s3:::*'
          - Sid: AllowBudgets
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: budgets.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:budgets::${AWS::AccountId}:*'

  SubscriptionEmail1:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: Email1Provided
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress1

  SubscriptionEmail2:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: Email2Provided
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress2

  SubscriptionHttps1:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: Https1Provided
    Properties:
      Protocol: https
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref HttpsEndpoint1
      DeliveryPolicy:
        http:
          defaultHealthyRetryPolicy:
            numRetries: 3
            numMinDelay: 5
            numMaxDelay: 30
            numNoDelayRetries: 0
            backoffRate: "2.0"
          defaultUnhealthyRetryPolicy:
            numRetries: 10
            numMinDelay: 15
            numMaxDelay: 300
            numNoDelayRetries: 0
            backoffRate: "2.0"

  SubscriptionHttps2:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: Https2Provided
    Properties:
      Protocol: https
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref HttpsEndpoint2
      DeliveryPolicy:
        http:
          defaultHealthyRetryPolicy:
            numRetries: 3
            numMinDelay: 5
            numMaxDelay: 30
            numNoDelayRetries: 0
            backoffRate: "2.0"
          defaultUnhealthyRetryPolicy:
            numRetries: 10
            numMinDelay: 15
            numMaxDelay: 300
            numNoDelayRetries: 0
            backoffRate: "2.0"

  FallbackSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Fallback'
      DisplayName: Fallback Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [KmsProvided, !Ref KmsKeyArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  FallbackSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: FallbackEmailProvided
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref FallbackSNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref FallbackEmail

  FailedNotificationsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FailedNotifications'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm on failed SNS notifications to trigger fallback
      Namespace: AWS/SNS
      MetricName: NumberOfNotificationsFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref FallbackSNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  PrimaryTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the primary SNS topic
    Value: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrimaryTopicArn'
  FallbackTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the fallback SNS topic
    Value: !Ref FallbackSNSTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FallbackTopicArn'
  AlarmArn:
    Description: ARN of the failed notifications alarm
    Value: !Ref FailedNotificationsAlarm
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AlarmArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates an AWS Batch environment for scalable S3 data processing using containerized jobs.

Parameters:
  InputObjectKey:
    Type: String
    Default: input.txt
    Description: S3 input object key for the sample job
  OutputObjectKey:
    Type: String
    Default: output.txt
    Description: S3 output object key for the sample job
  MaxVCPUs:
    Type: Number
    Default: 16
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 256
    Description: Maximum vCPUs for the compute environment
  InstanceTypes:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: m5.large
    Description: EC2 instance types for the compute environment
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access to Batch instances (optional)
  SSHInboundCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: CIDR for inbound SSH access to Batch instances (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16), leave empty to disable
    AllowedPattern: ^$|^(\\d{1,3}\\.){3}\\d{1,3}/\\d{1,2}$

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]
  CreateSSHRule: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SSHInboundCIDR, '']]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  BatchSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for AWS Batch compute instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - !If
          - CreateSSHRule
          - IpProtocol: tcp
            FromPort: 22
            ToPort: 22
            CidrIp: !Ref SSHInboundCIDR
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-batch-sg'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3bucket'

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': AES256

  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-batch-service-role'

  BatchInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2ContainerServiceforEC2Role
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchLogsFullAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BatchInstanceCustom
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-batch-instance-role'

  BatchInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref BatchInstanceRole

  BatchJobExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchLogsFullAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3BucketAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: AWSBatchS3Processing
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-batch-job-role'

  BatchComputeEnv:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      State: ENABLED
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      ComputeResources:
        Type: EC2
        MinvCpus: 0
        MaxvCpus: !Ref MaxVCPUs
        DesiredvCpus: 0
        InstanceTypes: !Ref InstanceTypes
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PublicSubnet
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchSecurityGroup
        Ec2KeyPair: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
        InstanceRole: !GetAtt BatchInstanceProfile.Arn
      Tags:
        Project: AWSBatchS3Processing
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-compute-env'

  BatchJobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      State: ENABLED
      Priority: 1
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !Ref BatchComputeEnv
      Tags:
        Project: AWSBatchS3Processing
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-job-queue'

  SampleS3JobDef:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    Properties:
      Type: container
      PlatformCapabilities:
        - EC2
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: amazonlinux:2
        Vcpus: 2
        Memory: 4096
        ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt BatchJobExecutionRole.Arn
        Command:
          - /bin/sh
          - -c
          - |
            yum update -y &&
            yum install -y awscli &&
            aws s3 cp "s3://$S3_BUCKET/$INPUT_KEY" /tmp/input &&
            aws s3 cp /tmp/input "s3://$S3_BUCKET/$OUTPUT_KEY" &&
            echo "Sample job completed successfully"
        Environment:
          - Name: S3_BUCKET
            Value: !Ref S3Bucket
          - Name: INPUT_KEY
            Value: !Ref InputObjectKey
          - Name: OUTPUT_KEY
            Value: !Ref OutputObjectKey
      Tags:
        Project: AWSBatchS3Processing
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-job-def'

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID for the AWS Batch environment
    Value: !Ref VPC
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for data processing
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  ComputeEnvironmentArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Compute Environment
    Value: !Ref BatchComputeEnv
  JobQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Job Queue
    Value: !Ref BatchJobQueue
  JobDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the sample AWS Batch Job Definition
    Value: !Ref SampleS3JobDef

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that provisions a self-contained VPC with a public subnet, security group, and EC2 t2.micro instance running Apache and PHP. The instance user data script installs software via cloud-init, retrieves a ZIP file from S3, deploys content to /var/www/html, and signals completion.

Parameters:
  VPCCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
  SubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket containing the ZIP file with web content (must be publicly readable)
  S3Key:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: S3 object key (path) to the ZIP file with web content
  InstanceKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: (Optional) Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access
  LatestAmazonLinuxAMIId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'

Conditions:
  KeyNameProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref InstanceKeyName, '']]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WebServerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server allowing HTTP and optional SSH
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerSG'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  HttpIngress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref WebServerSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 80
      ToPort: 80
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  SshIngress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Condition: KeyNameProvided
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref WebServerSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  AllTrafficEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref WebServerSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: -1
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  WebServer:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmazonLinuxAMIId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref WebServerSecurityGroup
      KeyName: !If [KeyNameProvided, !Ref InstanceKeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="==MYBOUNDARY=="
          --==MYBOUNDARY==
          MIME-Version: 1.0
          Content-Type: text/cloud-config; charset="us-ascii"
          #cloud-config
          package_update: true
          packages:
            - httpd
            - php
            - php-mbstring
            - php-xml
            - unzip
          services:
            httpd:
              enabled: true
              running: true
          --==MYBOUNDARY==
          MIME-Version: 1.0
          Content-Type: text/x-shellscript; charset="us-ascii"
          #!/bin/bash
          cd /tmp
          wget "https://${S3BucketName}.s3.amazonaws.com/${S3Key}" -O web.zip
          unzip -o web.zip -d /var/www/html/
          chown -R apache:apache /var/www/html
          find /var/www/html -type d -exec chmod 755 {} +
          find /var/www/html -type f -exec chmod 644 {} +
          rm -f web.zip
          systemctl restart httpd
          if systemctl is-active --quiet httpd; then
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource WebServer --region ${AWS::Region}
          else
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource WebServer --region ${AWS::Region}
          fi
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServer'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - SubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  WebServerInstance:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID of the web server
    Value: !Ref WebServer
  WebServerPublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the web server. Access the site at http://<PublicIp>
    Value: !GetAtt WebServer.PublicIp
  WebServerPublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the web server. Access the site at http://<PublicDnsName>
    Value: !GetAtt WebServer.PublicDnsName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic Lambda function with Node.js inline code and CloudWatch Logs permissions.'

Resources:
  LambdaBasicExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  BasicLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs24.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaBasicExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify({
                message: 'Hello from Lambda!',
                input: event
              })
            };
          };

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for invocation'
    Value: !GetAtt BasicLambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArn'
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: 'Name of the Lambda function for management'
    Value: !Ref BasicLambdaFunction
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFront distribution which fronts a regional API Gateway REST API with a mock backend. Defines API Gateway with /hello GET endpoint returning static "hello world" JSON response. CloudFront routes to production stage, disables caching, uses HTTPS to origin, and enforces HTTPS redirection for viewers.

Resources:
  HelloWorldApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  HelloResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt HelloWorldApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ResourceId: !Ref HelloResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: "{}"
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message": "hello world"}'
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseModels:
            application/json: 'Empty'

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
    DependsOn:
      - HelloMethod
      - HelloResource

  ApiStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      MethodSettings:
        - LoggingLevel: INFO
          DataTraceEnabled: true
          MetricsEnabled: true
          ResourcePath: '/*/*'
          HttpMethod: '*'

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        Origins:
          - Id: ApiGatewayOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub '${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
            OriginPath: '/prod'
            CustomOriginConfig:
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
              OriginSSLProtocols:
                - TLSv1.2
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ApiGatewayOrigin
