AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Governance-enforced developer IAM role with configurable permission boundaries enforcing naming prefixes (e.g., MyTeam*), mandatory Owner tags, and default permission boundary for developer-created IAM resources.'
Parameters:
  EnableStrictBoundaries:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - yes
      - no
    Default: yes
    Description: 'Toggle to enable (Yes) or disable (No) strict permission boundary enforcement (default: Yes)'
  TeamPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTeam
    Description: 'Naming prefix for team-managed IAM roles and policies (e.g., MyTeam*)'
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTeam
    Description: 'Value for the mandatory Owner tag on all developer-managed IAM resources'
  DeveloperRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: DeveloperIAMRole
    Description: 'Name of the developer IAM role'
Conditions:
  StrictEnabled: !Equals
    - !Ref EnableStrictBoundaries
    - yes
Resources:
  DefaultBoundaryPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DefaultBoundary'
      Description: 'Default permission boundary policy restricting actions to S3 full access and IAM read-only operations'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: s3:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:Get*
              - iam:List*
            Resource: '*'
  DeveloperRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref DeveloperRoleName
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'true'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DeveloperIAMPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Fn::If:
              - StrictEnabled
              -
                Version: '2012-10-17'
                Statement:
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:Get*
                      - iam:List*
                    Resource: '*'
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action: iam:CreateRole
                    Resource: '*'
                    Condition:
                      StringLike:
                        'iam:RoleName': !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
                      StringEquals:
                        'iam:RequestTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
                        'iam:PermissionsBoundary': !GetAtt DefaultBoundaryPolicy.PolicyArn
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action: iam:CreatePolicy
                    Resource: '*'
                    Condition:
                      StringLike:
                        'iam:PolicyName': !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
                      StringEquals:
                        'iam:RequestTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:DeleteRole
                      - iam:UpdateRole
                      - iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy
                      - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                      - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                      - iam:PassRole
                      - iam:PutRolePermissionsBoundary
                      - iam:TagRole
                      - iam:UntagRole
                    Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        'iam:ResourceTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
                        'iam:PermissionsBoundary': !GetAtt DefaultBoundaryPolicy.PolicyArn
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:DeletePolicy
                      - iam:CreatePolicyVersion
                      - iam:DeletePolicyVersion
                      - iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion
                      - iam:TagPolicy
                      - iam:UntagPolicy
                    Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        'iam:ResourceTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action: sts:AssumeRole
                    Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
              -
                Version: '2012-10-17'
                Statement:
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action: iam:*
                    Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref OwnerTagValue
Outputs:
  DeveloperRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Developer IAM Role'
    Value: !GetAtt DeveloperRole.Arn
  DefaultBoundaryArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Default Permission Boundary Policy'
    Value: !GetAtt DefaultBoundaryPolicy.PolicyArn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AppSync GraphQL API with Lambda backend for Pet Inventory Query Service

Parameters:
  ApiName:
    Type: String
    Default: PetShopAPI
    Description: Name of the AppSync GraphQL API

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${ApiName}-LambdaExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ApiName

  PetInventoryLambda:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${ApiName}-PetInventoryLambda'
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return [
              {"id": "1", "name": "Fluffy", "type": "Cat"},
              {"id": "2", "name": "Spot", "type": "Dog"}
            ];
          };
      Timeout: 10
      MemorySize: 128
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ApiName

  AppSyncLambdaServiceRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${ApiName}-AppSyncLambdaServiceRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: appsync.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${ApiName}-InvokePetLambda'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ApiName

  PetShopAPI:
    Type: 'AWS::AppSync::GraphQLApi'
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ApiName
      AuthenticationType: API_KEY
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ApiName

  ApiKey:
    Type: 'AWS::AppSync::ApiKey'
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Expires: 365

  GraphQLSchema:
    Type: 'AWS::AppSync::GraphQLSchema'
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Definition: |
        type Pet {
          id: ID!
          name: String!
          type: String!
        }
        type Query {
          getPets: [Pet!]!
        }

  PetDataSource:
    Type: 'AWS::AppSync::DataSource'
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Name: PetDataSource
      Type: AWS_LAMBDA
      LambdaConfig:
        LambdaFunctionArn: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt AppSyncLambdaServiceRole.Arn
    DependsOn: GraphQLSchema

  GetPetsResolver:
    Type: 'AWS::AppSync::Resolver'
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      TypeName: Query
      FieldName: getPets
      DataSourceName: PetDataSource
      RequestMappingTemplate: |
        {
          "version": "2018-05-29",
          "payload": {}
        }
      ResponseMappingTemplate: "$util.toJson($ctx.result)"
    DependsOn:
      - GraphQLSchema
      - PetDataSource

Outputs:
  GraphQLAPIURL:
    Description: GraphQL API endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.GraphQLUrl
  ApiKeyValue:
    Description: API Key for anonymous access
    Value: !Ref ApiKey
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
